english: He thinks of no one but himself.
hanzi: 他很霸道，都不想別人的立場。
poj: I chin à-pà, lóng bô siūⁿ pa̍t-lâng ê li̍p-tiûⁿ
tl: I tsin à-pà, lóng bô siūnn pa̍t-lâng ê li̍p-tiûnn

english: He encroached on other people's land.
poj: I bat à-pà lâng ê chhân-hn̂g.
tl: I bat à-pà lâng ê tshân-hn̂g.

english: He was crushed to death, there is no way to revive him.
hanzi: 他被人壓得死死，沒辦法反抗了。
poj: I hō͘ lâng ah-tó-thâu a, bô hoat-tō͘ thang hoán-khòng a.
tl: I hōo lâng ah-tó-thâu a, bô huat-tōo thang huán-khòng a.

english: She likes to be pretty. She is always looking in a mirror.
hanzi: 她真愛美，常常在照鏡子。
poj: I chin ài-súi, siông-siông teh chiò-kiàⁿ.
tl: I tsin ài-suí, siông-siông teh tsiò-kiànn.

english: That room is very dark, can you see well enough to write characters?
hanzi: 那間黑漆漆的，看得見能寫字嗎？
poj: Hit keng àm-bîn-bong kám ū khòaⁿ-kìⁿ thang siá-jī?
tl: Hit king àm-bîn-bong kám ū khuànn-kìnn thang siá-jī?

english: He tugged on my sleeve so I remembered.
hanzi: 他暗中提醒我，我才想到。
poj: I àm-tiong thê-chhéⁿ góa, góa chiah siūⁿ-tio̍h.
tl: I àm-tiong thê-tshénn guá, guá tsiah siūnn-tio̍h.

english: He asked for three more days to return the money (to return the shirt).
hanzi: 那筆錢（那件衣服）他又拖三天。
poj: Hit tiâu chîⁿ (hit niá saⁿ) i koh ān saⁿ ji̍t.
tl: Hit tiâu tsînn (hit niá sann) i koh ān sann ji̍t.

english: Again and again he put off returning it.
poj: I ān chi̍t pái kòe chi̍t pái iáu m̄ hêng góa.
tl: I ān tsi̍t pái kuè tsi̍t pái iáu m̄ hîng guá.

english: give me a little time to get something done
the train is safer than a car
He is very popular now. He is very influential (weighty) now.
If he is does that to me, I'll look for an opportunity to retaliate.
hanzi: 他如果這樣，我會讓他難堪，找機會報復。
poj: I nā tùi góa hiah-ni̍h pháiⁿ, góa ē phah chi̍t ki âng-kun hō͘ i kàu.
tl: I nā tuì guá hiah-ni̍h pháinn, guá ē phah tsi̍t ki âng-kun hōo i kàu.

english: Are you going to present him with a gift or money on his birthday?
hanzi: 他的生日你要送禮物或是紅包 ？
poj: I ê seⁿ-ji̍t lí boeh sàng lé-bu̍t á-sī âng-pau?
tl: I ê senn-ji̍t lí bueh sàng lé-bu̍t á-sī âng-pau?

english: Even good news you don't dare to let me know, you certainly are crafty.
hanzi: 好事也不敢通告一下，你實在很陰險。
poj: Hó-khang ê iā m̄-káⁿ pò chi̍t-ē, lí si̍t-chāi chin àng-tō͘.
tl: Hó-khang ê iā m̄-kánn pò tsi̍t-ē, lí si̍t-tsāi tsin àng-tōo.

english: I've caught a cold. My throat hurts.

poj: Góa khiā tī i ê āu-bīn (āu-piah).
tl: Guá khiā tī i ê āu-bīn (āu-piah).

english: He looks grave (vexed or angry), I wonder what he is angry about.
hanzi: 他繃著臉，不知在懊惱什麼 ？
poj: I bīn àu-tū-tū, m̄-chai teh àu-náu sím-mih?
tl: I bīn àu-tū-tū, m̄-tsai teh àu-náu sím-mih?

poj: I chē tī góa ê āu-piah.
tl: I tsē tī guá ê āu-piah.

english: His face is always morose and displeased, I wonder what he is so unhappy about.
hanzi: 他老是繃著臉，不知為什麼不高興 ？
poj: I ê bīn put-sî àu-tū-tū, m̄-chai teh bô hoaⁿ-hí sím-mih?
tl: I ê bīn put-sî àu-tū-tū, m̄-tsai teh bô huann-hí sím-mih?

english: wild cat, a harlot, a vile scolding
have the power of calculating or recognizing at a glance
The expression in that kid's eyes is very bright.
poj: Hit e gín-á ba̍k-sîn chin oa̍h.
tl: Hit e gín-á ba̍k-sîn tsin ua̍h.

english: There is still time, it's okay to take your time.
hanzi: 還有時間慢慢地不要緊。
poj: Iáu ū sî-kan, bān-bān-á-sī bô iàu-kín.
tl: Iáu ū sî-kan, bān-bān-á-sī bô iàu-kín.

english: I don't like to do work that is only a lot of miscellaneous small jobs.
hanzi: 那種零零碎碎的工作我不要做。
poj: Hit khoán bak-bak-tak-tak ê khang-khòe góa bô ài chò.
tl: Hit khuán bak-bak-tak-tak ê khang-khuè guá bô ài tsò.

poj: I sī ba̍k-chhiūⁿ-ê. I teh chò ba̍k-chhiūⁿ.
tl: I sī ba̍k-tshiūnn-ê. I teh tsò ba̍k-tshiūnn.

english: His eyes are wide open, he's not sleeping.
poj: I ba̍k-chiu kim-kim, bô teh khùn.
tl: I ba̍k-tsiu kim-kim, bô teh khùn.

english: His vision is very good, he saw me from far away.
hanzi: 他眼光很銳利，那麼遠就看到我。
poj: I ba̍k-chiu chin lāi, hiah hn̄g chiū ū khòaⁿ-tio̍h góa.
tl: I ba̍k-tsiu tsin lāi, hiah hn̄g tsiū ū khuànn-tio̍h guá.

english: His eyes are very sharp, you cannot cheat him.
hanzi: 他眼光很銳利，你騙不了的。
poj: I ba̍k-chiu chin lāi, hō͘ lí bē phiàn-tit.
tl: I ba̍k-tsiu tsin lāi, hōo lí bē phiàn-tit.

english: My eyes are drooping, I am very sleepy.
poj: Góa ba̍k-chiu chin siap, chin ài-khùn.
tl: Guá ba̍k-tsiu tsin siap, tsin ài-khùn.

english: If he is short of sleep, he has bags under his eyes.
hanzi: 他睡眠一不足，眼窩就內凹。
poj: I nā bô bîn, ba̍k-chiu chiū thap-thap.
tl: I nā bô bîn, ba̍k-tsiu tsiū thap-thap.

english: It's so smoky that tears come into my eyes
Mountain people get married younger than people who live on the plain.
hanzi: 原住民較早婚，平地人較晚婚。
poj: Goân-chū-bîn khah chá-hun, pêⁿ-tē-lâng khah bān-hun.
tl: Guân-tsū-bîn khah tsá-hun, pênn-tē-lâng khah bān-hun.

english: good dream, bad or terrible dream
He contracted that work and made enough to buy a house.
hanzi: 他包那個工作，賺一棟房子。
poj: I ba̍uh hit thoaⁿ khang-khòe, báu chi̍t tòng chhù.
tl: I ba̍uh hit thuann khang-khuè, báu tsi̍t tòng tshù.

english: I am (was) not afraid. (sleepy, thirsty, hungry)
I don't think it will rain.
I was very cold last night, were you?
poj: Góa chang-àm chin kôaⁿ, lí ē kôaⁿ bē ?
tl: Guá tsang-àm tsin kuânn, lí ē kuânn bē ?

english: Previously I did not have much of an appetite, now I eat very well.
hanzi: 我以前的食慾不好，近來食慾較好。
poj: Góa í-chêng khah bē-chia̍h, kīn-lâi khah gâu-chia̍h a.
tl: Guá í-tsîng khah bē-tsia̍h, kīn-lâi khah gâu-tsia̍h a.

english: no end of things to be learned (Lit. Education goes on forever, studying never stops.)
I don't know how to drive a car.
I cannot (don't know how to) speak English.
I cannot (don't know how to) eat with chopsticks.
He cannot recover from his sickness.
He always has so many things to he never can get started so he is never on time.
hanzi: 他很會拖，所以常常趕不上時間。
poj: I chin gâu sô, só͘-í tiāⁿ-tiāⁿ bē hù sî-kan.
tl: I tsin gâu sô, sóo-í tiānn-tiānn bē hù sî-kan.

english: Can you recognize that person's face? (Do you recognize that person?)
poj: Hit ê lâng ê bīn lí ē-jīn-tit bē? (Lí ē-jīn-tit hit ê lâng bē?)
tl: Hit ê lâng ê bīn lí ē-jīn-tit bē? (Lí ē-jīn-tit hit ê lâng bē?)

english: I am not worthy to be a child of God.
hanzi: 我當不起做天主的義子。
poj: Góa bē-kham-tit chò Thian-Chú ê gī-chú.
tl: Guá bē-kham-tit tsò Thian-Tsú ê gī-tsú.

english: It is undeserving that you pour wine for me.
I used my own money, what are you jealous about?
hanzi: 用的是我自己的錢，你是在嫉妒什麼？
poj: Iōng-ê sī góa ka-tī ê chîⁿ, lí sī teh bē-khat-tit sím-mih?
tl: Iōng-ê sī guá ka-tī ê tsînn, lí sī teh bē-khat-tit sím-mih?

english: He is not to be blamed for doing it He did it of necessity.
hanzi: 他這樣做怪不得，怪不得他這樣做。
poj: I án-ne chò bē-koài-tit. (Bē-koài-tit i án-ne chò.)
tl: I án-ne tsò bē-kuài-tit. (Bē-kuài-tit i án-ne tsò.)

english: Because a visitor came, I could not finish my meal
hanzi: 因為客人來，這餐飯吃不成。
poj: In-ūi lâng-kheh lâi, chit tǹg chia̍h bē kòe-chhiú.
tl: In-uī lâng-kheh lâi, tsit tǹg tsia̍h bē kuè-tshiú.

english: He is never satisfied drinking only one bottle of wine.
poj: I lim chi̍t koàn chiú iáu bē kòe-giàn.
tl: I lim tsi̍t kuàn tsiú iáu bē kuè-giàn.

english: I can't believe anything he says.
poj: I kóng ê ōe góa lóng bē-sìn-tit.
tl: I kóng ê uē guá lóng bē-sìn-tit.

english: I can not write a letter because there is no paper.
poj: In-ūi bô chóa, bē-tàng siá phoe.
tl: In-uī bô tsuá, bē-tàng siá phue.

english: I can not come, because I am very busy.
poj: Góa bē-tàng (bē tit-thang) lâi, in-ūi chin bô êng.
tl: Guá bē-tàng (bē tit-thang) lâi, in-uī tsin bô îng.

english: It's not provided for in the law.
push straight forward to one's goal or aim
Here's a riddle for you to figure out.
poj: Góa chò chi̍t ê bī hō͘ lí ioh (chhai)
tl: Guá tsò tsi̍t ê bī hōo lí ioh (tshai)

english: prevent, to nip an evil in the bud
use a beautiful woman to extort money
The rich are not always happy.
having a human face but brute's heart
That child is very diligent, he'll go a long way.
hanzi: 那個孩子很用功，將來很有希望。
poj: Hit ê gín-ná chin bián-kióng, chiong-lâi chin ū hi-bōng.
tl: Hit ê gín-ná tsin bián-kióng, tsiong-lâi tsin ū hi-bōng.

english: I feel uncertain about what to do.
hanzi: 我感到迷惘，不知要如何做。
poj: Góa kám-kak bông-bông biáu-biáu, m̄-chai boeh àn-chóaⁿ chò.
tl: Guá kám-kak bông-bông biáu-biáu, m̄-tsai bueh àn-tsuánn tsò.

english: You are not stealing things, why are you acting so furtively?
hanzi: 又不是當小偷，怎麼要這樣偷偷摸摸？
poj: Iā m̄-sī teh chò chha̍t-á, ná tio̍h án-ne bih-bih-chhih-chhih.
tl: Iā m̄-sī teh tsò tsha̍t-á, ná tio̍h án-ne bih-bih-tshih-tshih.

english: create disturbance in the minds of people
There is a close connection between him and me.
poj: Góa kah i ū bi̍t-chhiat ê koan-hē.
tl: Guá kah i ū bi̍t-tshiat ê kuan-hē.

english: It was unfortunate that that person died.
poj: Hit ê lâng sí-khì, chin bô chhái.
tl: Hit ê lâng sí-khì, tsin bô tshái.

english: It was unfortunate that I was unable to see that movie.
hanzi: 那部電影沒看到，很可惜。
poj: Hit chhut tiān-iáⁿ khòaⁿ bô tio̍h, chin bô chhái.
tl: Hit tshut tiān-iánn khuànn bô tio̍h, tsin bô tshái.

english: Too bad you took that shirt to wipe off the bicycle.
hanzi: 那件衣服拿去擦自行車，很可惜。
poj: Hit niá saⁿ the̍h khì chhit thih-bé, chin bô chhái.
tl: Hit niá sann the̍h khì tshit thih-bé, tsin bô tshái.

english: Since the teacher didn't come, call the gate keeper to teach Taiwanese.
hanzi: 因為老師沒來，沒辦法，叫看門的來教台語。
poj: In-ūi lāu-su bô lâi, bô gû sái bé, kiò kò͘-mn̂g-ê lâi kà Tâi-oân-ōe.
tl: In-uī lāu-su bô lâi, bô gû sái bé, kiò kòo-mn̂g-ê lâi kà Tâi-uân-uē.

english: That kind of medicine has no effect.
He doesn't act responsibly, some things he has done are not done well.
hanzi: 他做事不得要領，一些事情都沒做好。
poj: I chò tāi-chì chin bô hē-lo̍h, chi̍t-kóa tāi-chì chò lóng bô hó-sè.
tl: I tsò tāi-tsì tsin bô hē-lo̍h, tsi̍t-kuá tāi-tsì tsò lóng bô hó-sè.

english: That school is very disorderly. (That company is unsystematic.)
hanzi: 那間學校（公司）一點系統都沒有。
poj: Hit keng ha̍k-hāu (kong-si) chin bô hē-thóng.
tl: Hit king ha̍k-hāu (kong-si) tsin bô hē-thóng.

english: Because he hasn't, who knows where he is?
hanzi: 因為沒來信，怎麼知道他在哪裏？
poj: In-ūi bô-hôe-bô-phoe, boeh ná ē chai-iáⁿ i tī toh-ūi?
tl: In-uī bô-huê-bô-phue, bueh ná ē tsai-iánn i tī toh-uī?

english: For no reason at all he socked me.
poj: I bô-iân bô-kò͘ kā góa phah.
tl: I bô-iân bô-kòo kā guá phah.

english: He has no relationship with me at all.
If he wants to go some place, he doesn't tell anyone he just goes.
hanzi: 他如果要去那兒都不說就走。
poj: I nā boeh khì toh-ūi lóng bô-kóng-bô-tāⁿ tō cháu.
tl: I nā bueh khì toh-uī lóng bô-kóng-bô-tānn tō tsáu.

english: Not many days previously I went to Taipei.
poj: Góa bô kúi ji̍t chêng ū khì Tâi-pak.
tl: Guá bô kuí ji̍t tsîng ū khì Tâi-pak.

english: We don't have anything to say, we're only having a chat.
hanzi: 我們沒在說什麼，閒話家常而已。
poj: Goán bô teh kóng siaⁿh, kan-na bô ōe kóng ka-ló niā-niā.
tl: Guán bô teh kóng siannh, kan-na bô uē kóng ka-ló niā-niā.

english: He is a man of matchless bravery.
A child of his died so he doesn't have the heart to work.
hanzi: 他一個孩子死了，所以沒有心情做事。
poj: I chi̍t ê kiáⁿ sí khì, só͘-í bô sim-chiâⁿ thang chò tāi-chì.
tl: I tsi̍t ê kiánn sí khì, sóo-í bô sim-tsiânn thang tsò tāi-tsì.

english: Whatever he does is only superficial, he has no heart or interest in it.
hanzi: 他做的都是表面的，都是無心假有意。
poj: I chò ê lóng sī piáu-bīn ê, lóng sī bô-sim ké ū-ì ê.
tl: I tsò ê lóng sī piáu-bīn ê, lóng sī bô-sim ké ū-ì ê.

english: I do this because there is nothing else I can do.
hanzi: 我會做這種事，是很不得已的。
poj: Góa ē chò chit khoán tāi-chì, sī chin bô-ta-tit-ôa ê.
tl: Guá ē tsò tsit khuán tāi-tsì, sī tsin bô-ta-tit-uâ ê.

english: Not only did he refuse to pay me the money, he beat me up.
poj: I (put-tān) chîⁿ m̄ hêng góa, bô-táⁿ-kín koh kā góa phah.
tl: I (put-tān) tsînn m̄ hîng guá, bô-tánn-kín koh kā guá phah.

english: He's very fickle, you can't believe him.
hanzi: 他講話反覆無常，不能相信。
poj: I kóng-ōe bô-tiāⁿ bô-tio̍h, bē sìn-tit.
tl: I kóng-uē bô-tiānn bô-tio̍h, bē sìn-tit.

english: When I was young, my parents worked very hard.
poj: Góa sè-hàn ê sî, pē-bó chin thoa-bôa.
tl: Guá sè-hàn ê sî, pē-bó tsin thua-buâ.

english: His later life was very difficult.
poj: I boán-liân ê seng-oa̍h chin kan-khó͘.
tl: I buán-liân ê sing-ua̍h tsin kan-khóo.

english: He is sitting way in back.
He is still walking way in the back.
poj: I iáu tī bóe-āu teh kiâⁿ.
tl: I iáu tī bué-āu teh kiânn.

english: I don't want to bid for lending the money, I'll be "boe-hoe" so I get more interest.
hanzi: 我都不標，我要作尾會，比較有利息。
poj: Góa lóng bô ài pio, góa boeh chò bóe-hōe khah ū lī-sek.
tl: Guá lóng bô ài pio, guá bueh tsò bué-huē khah ū lī-sik.

poj: I só͘ kóng ê ōe bo̍k-bêng kî biāu.
tl: I sóo kóng ê uē bo̍k-bîng kî biāu.

english: He is not a stonecutter, he's a woodcarver.
impossible to find out, like trying to find a needle in a hay stack (Lit. looking for a needle in the ocean)
be confused, hurriedly, in a flurry
show off one's strength of power
He is no kith and kin of mine.
resort to arms, settle a dispute with arms
gives rise to questions, gives rise to certain problems,
Do you know when he will come?
hanzi: 他什麼時候會來，你知道嗎 ？
poj: I tang-sî ē lâi, lí chai-iáⁿ bô͘?
tl: I tang-sî ē lâi, lí tsai-iánn bôo?

english: Please go get the package I sent out.
hanzi: 我寄去的小包，請你查收。
poj: Góa kià khì ê sió-pau, chhiáⁿ lí cha-siu.
tl: Guá kià khì ê sió-pau, tshiánn lí tsa-siu.

english: I forgot to bring some money.
The moon is obscured by clouds.
young flower plants from a nursery
I have spoken to you again and again, why don't you listen? Why don't you do what you are told?
hanzi: 我一再勸你，你怎麼不聽 ？
poj: Góa chài-saⁿ chài-sì kā lí kóng, lí àn-chóaⁿ m̄ thiaⁿ?
tl: Guá tsài-sann tsài-sì kā lí kóng, lí àn-tsuánn m̄ thiann?

english: during a person's lifetime, while one lives
When the accident occurred he was also on the spot.
hanzi: 那個事故發生時，他也在場。
poj: Hit ê sū-kò͘ hoat-seng ê sî, i iā chāi-tiûⁿ.
tl: Hit ê sū-kòo huat-sing ê sî, i iā tsāi-tiûnn.

english: Do you know where Sun-moon Lake is?
hanzi: 日月潭在何處，你知道嗎？
poj: Ji̍t-goa̍t-thâm tī toh-ūi, lí chai-ūi bô͘?
tl: Ji̍t-gua̍t-thâm tī toh-uī, lí tsai-uī bôo?

english: Young children, flies and mosquitoes can be very disturbing.
poj: gín-ná (hô͘-sîn, báng-á) chin gâu chak lâng.
tl: gín-ná (hôo-sîn, báng-á) tsin gâu tsak lâng.

english: I have taken up much of your time Please pardon me for disturbing you for such a long time.
She is a critical woman, just be a little more patient.
hanzi: 他是一個發牢騷的女人，忍耐一下就好了啦！
poj: I sī chi̍t ê cha̍p-liām-pô, khah jím-nāi chi̍t ē tō hó a la.
tl: I sī tsi̍t ê tsa̍p-liām-pô, khah jím-nāi tsi̍t ē tō hó a la.

english: Economize until we are paid this month's salary.
hanzi: 薪水還未領，錢得省著用。
poj: Goe̍h-kip iáu-bōe niá, chîⁿ tio̍h chat teh ēng.
tl: Gue̍h-kip iáu-buē niá, tsînn tio̍h tsat teh īng.

english: The theater is packed to capacity.
musical performance, to play or perform
Have you change for a fifty dollar bill?
hanzi: 伍拾元鈔，你有零錢找嗎 ？
poj: Gō͘-cha̍p-phiò lí ū thang chāu bô͘?
tl: Gōo-tsa̍p-phiò lí ū thang tsāu bôo?

english: He doesn't' have a store so he can only sell goods here and there to do business.
hanzi: 他自己沒有店，所以都在做流動生意。
poj: I ka-tī bô tiàm, só͘-í lóng teh chò cháu-chúi-á seng-lí.
tl: I ka-tī bô tiàm, sóo-í lóng teh tsò tsáu-tsuí-á sing-lí.

poj: I chhiùⁿ-koa chhiùⁿ liáu ū cháu-im.
tl: I tshiùnn-kua tshiùnn liáu ū tsáu-im.

english: He used the wrong tones when speaking, I don't know what he said.
hanzi: 那句話，他說走了音，我聽不懂。
poj: Hit kù ōe, i kóng liáu ū cháu-im, góa thiaⁿ bô.
tl: Hit kù uē, i kóng liáu ū tsáu-im, guá thiann bô.

english: He owes people all kinds of money, now he's hiding out.
hanzi: 他倒人很多錢，現在到處逃債。
poj: I tó lâng chin-chē chîⁿ, chím-má chi̍t-sì-kè teh cháu-lō͘.
tl: I tó lâng tsin-tsē tsînn, tsím-má tsi̍t-sì-kè teh tsáu-lōo.

english: He toppled someone's mutual loan group, now he is "on the lam" (running away to hide from trouble).
hanzi: 他倒別人的會錢，現在在走三關了。
poj: I tó lâng ê hōe-á, chím-á teh cháu-sam-koan a.
tl: I tó lâng ê huē-á, tsím-á teh tsáu-sam-kuan a.

english: I do not mean to insult you.
poj: Góa m̄-sī kò͘-ì boeh chau-that lí.
tl: Guá m̄-sī kòo-ì bueh tsau-that lí.

english: debt, loan, be in debt, run into debt
They keep a well assorted stock at that shop.
poj: Hit khám tiàm mi̍h-kiāⁿ ū chê.
tl: Hit khám tiàm mi̍h-kiānn ū tsê.

english: sanction, punishment, punish, chastisement by law
That factory refines salt from sea water.
hanzi: 那家工廠用海水在製鹽。
poj: Hit keng kang-tiûⁿ iōng hái-chúi teh chè-iâm.
tl: Hit king kang-tiûnn iōng hái-tsuí teh tsè-iâm.

english: I am unworthy to occupy the chief seat.
the dragonboat festival on the fifth of the fifth moon
principle of handling or doing something
He is a respectable person, how come he would so something like that?
hanzi: 他是一個正人君子，怎麼會做那種事情。
poj: I sī chi̍t ê chèng-jîn kun-chú, boeh ná ē chò hit khoán tāi-chì.
tl: I sī tsi̍t ê tsìng-jîn kun-tsú, bueh ná ē tsò hit khuán tāi-tsì.

english: I wake up every morning at three o'clock.
hanzi: 我每天早上都三點就醒過來了。
poj: Góa ta̍k chái-khí lóng saⁿ-tiám chiū cheng-sîn khit-lâi a.
tl: Guá ta̍k tsái-khí lóng sann-tiám tsiū tsing-sîn khit-lâi a.

english: racial differentiation, racial differences, racial segregation, discrimination
You play, I'll just kibitz, okay?
poj: Hō͘ lí ī, góa chhah-hoe-á chiū hó.
tl: Hōo lí ī, guá tshah-hue-á tsiū hó.

english: He's always arguing with people, how can you possibly win an argument with him.
hanzi: 他是強辯者，你怎麼辯得過他？
poj: I sī chi̍t ê chhāi-chèⁿ-ông, lí ná chèⁿ ē iâⁿ i?
tl: I sī tsi̍t ê tshāi-tsènn-ông, lí ná tsènn ē iânn i?

english: You should say what's okay or not okay, if you just stand there and get angry who knows what you think.
hanzi: 好或壞要講，只在那兒使性子坐著不動，誰知道你的意思？
poj: Hó-pháiⁿ m̄ tō kóng, kan-na tòa hia chhāi-tèng-hēng, chiâ chai-iáⁿ lí ê ì-sù?
tl: Hó-pháinn m̄ tō kóng, kan-na tuà hia tshāi-tìng-hīng, tsiâ tsai-iánn lí ê ì-sù?

english: That man is very fierce, he used a knife to stab someone.
hanzi: 那個人很凶殘，用刀子殺死了一個人。
poj: Hit ê lâng chin chhân, iōng to-á tu̍h-sí chi̍t ê lâng.
tl: Hit ê lâng tsin tshân, iōng to-á tu̍h-sí tsi̍t ê lâng.

english: He's a real hick, he has never seen a radio.
hanzi: 那個人很土，還未見過收音機。
poj: Hit ê lâng chin chhân-chng-sông, iáu m̄-bat khòaⁿ-kìⁿ siu-im-ki.
tl: Hit ê lâng tsin tshân-tsng-sông, iáu m̄-bat khuànn-kìnn siu-im-ki.

english: I will not meddle with the matter.
I will have nothing to do with him.
That kind of flower grows very quickly.
hanzi: 那種花很賤俗，隨意種就能活。

english: to tie or bundle hay or straw into sheaves
He is not all that bad but people always like to scold him.
hanzi: 他人也不壞，不過常常被罵。
poj: I lâng to bô lōa bái, m̄-kú tiāⁿ-tiāⁿ teh chò chhàu-thâu ke-á.
tl: I lâng to bô luā bái, m̄-kú tiānn-tiānn teh tsò tshàu-thâu ke-á.

english: What he says isn't true, he always likes to brag.
hanzi: 他說的都不是真的，都是在吹牛的。
poj: I kóng ê lóng m̄-sī chin ê, lóng sī teh chhàu-tōaⁿ ê.
tl: I kóng ê lóng m̄-sī tsin ê, lóng sī teh tshàu-tuānn ê.

english: I'll send someone to tell you.
poj: Góa ē chhe lâng khì kā lí kóng.
tl: Guá ē tshe lâng khì kā lí kóng.

english: I am going to hire a boy to do miscellaneous work.
hanzi: 我要僱一個小孩來使喚。
poj: Góa boeh chhiàⁿ chi̍t ê gín-ná thang chhe-ēng.
tl: Guá bueh tshiànn tsi̍t ê gín-ná thang tshe-īng.

english: both people and place are unfamiliar
I really hate that kind of man.
poj: Góa chin chheh hit khoán lâng.
tl: Guá tsin tsheh hit khuán lâng.

english: This is the way I plan it, if there is a problem we can fix it up.
hanzi: 我打算這樣，如有問題，我們可以再商量。
poj: Góa phah-sǹg án-ne, nā ū būn-tê lán ē-tàng koh chhi-chhek.
tl: Guá phah-sǹg án-ne, nā ū būn-tê lán ē-tàng koh tshi-tshik.

english: experimental, explosion of a nuclear bomb
That meat is not very fresh.
hanzi: 那些肉的新鮮度已經很低了。
poj: Hiah ê bah ê chhiⁿ-tō͘ í-keng chin kē a.
tl: Hiah ê bah ê tshinn-tōo í-king tsin kē a.

english: If no one cares for a child, can it possibly grow up into an adult.
hanzi: 孩子沒人養育能成人嗎？
poj: Gín-á bô lâng chhiâⁿ kám ē sêng lâng?
tl: Gín-á bô lâng tshiânn kám ē sîng lâng?

english: He has to hop, because one leg is injured
hanzi: 他一隻腳傷了，得用獨腳跳。
poj: I chi̍t kha teh thiàⁿ, tio̍h iōng chhiáng ê.
tl: I tsi̍t kha teh thiànn, tio̍h iōng tshiáng ê.

english: I like to shower with cold water.
The detective searched him or his home.
He is very kind to us.
He is as clever as his father.
poj: I chhin-chhiūⁿ in lāu-pē hiah-ni̍h gâu.
tl: I tshin-tshiūnn in lāu-pē hiah-ni̍h gâu.

english: I dropped a button on the floor, bring a flashlight and shine it around to see if it is under the table
hanzi: 我的扣子掉了一個，拿手電筒來照照看有沒有在桌下 ？
poj: Góa ê liú-á lak chi̍t lia̍p khì, gia̍h chhiú-tiān lâi chhiō khòaⁿ ū tī toh-kha bô͘?
tl: Guá ê liú-á lak tsi̍t lia̍p khì, gia̍h tshiú-tiān lâi tshiō khuànn ū tī toh-kha bôo?

hanzi: 他們的婚事是我促成的。
poj: In ê hun-sū sī góa kā in chhiok-sêng ê.
tl: In ê hun-sū sī guá kā in tshiok-sîng ê.

english: That kid is in the habit of picking things up.
poj: Hit ê gín-á chin pháiⁿ chhiú-jiáu.
tl: Hit ê gín-á tsin pháinn tshiú-jiáu.

english: His coat is worn out at the elbow.
hanzi: 他衣服的肘部破了一個洞。
poj: I ê saⁿ chhiú-kó͘-thâu phòa chit khang.
tl: I ê sann tshiú-kóo-thâu phuà tsit khang.

english: palms of the hand always perspiring

poj: Hit ê lâng siá-jī chin chhó.
tl: Hit ê lâng siá-jī tsin tshó.

english: I am not wrong, why should I apologize to him.
hanzi: 我沒什麼錯誤，為何要向他謝罪。
poj: Góa bô sím-mih chhò-gō͘, ná tio̍h kā i siā-chōe.
tl: Guá bô sím-mih tshò-gōo, ná tio̍h kā i siā-tsuē.

english: Very often I have an illusion, I think I am still in the States.
hanzi: 我常常有錯覺，以為還在美國。
poj: Góa siông-siông khí chhò-kak, siūⁿ-chò góa iáu tī Bí-kok.
tl: Guá siông-siông khí tshò-kak, siūnn-tsò guá iáu tī Bí-kok.

english: Before I write a letter, I make a draft.
Your audio equipment (soundbox) is too loud, it disturbs people.
poj: Im-hiáng siuⁿ tōa siaⁿ chin chhò-lâng-hīⁿ.
tl: Im-hiáng siunn tuā siann tsin tshò-lâng-hīnn.

english: When I first came to Taiwan, I did not know how to use chopsticks at all.
hanzi: 我剛剛到台灣的時候，都不會用筷子吃飯。
poj: Góa chho͘-chho͘ lâi Tâi-oân ê sî, lóng bē-hiáu ēng tī chia̍h-pn̄g.
tl: Guá tshoo-tshoo lâi Tâi-uân ê sî, lóng bē-hiáu īng tī tsia̍h-pn̄g.

english: He is very prone to jealousy.
poj: Hit ê lâng chin gâu chia̍h-chhò͘.
tl: Hit ê lâng tsin gâu tsia̍h-tshòo.

english: I'm going to make less expensive pants to wear everyday.
hanzi: 我要做一件較便宜的褲子當便裝
poj: Góa boeh chò chi̍t niá khah sio̍k ê khò͘, thang chho͘-chhēng.
tl: Guá bueh tsò tsi̍t niá khah sio̍k ê khòo, thang tshoo-tshīng.

english: This is the first time he came to Taiwan.
hanzi: 他初次來台灣。他頭一次來台灣。
poj: I chho͘-chhù (thâu chi̍t chhù) lâi Tâi-oân.
tl: I tshoo-tshù (thâu tsi̍t tshù) lâi Tâi-uân.

english: I want to take this child to see a doctor.
hanzi: 我要帶這個孩子去看醫生。
poj: Góa boeh chhōa chit ê gín-á khì hō͘ i-seng khòaⁿ.
tl: Guá bueh tshuā tsit ê gín-á khì hōo i-sing khuànn.

english: When I climb upstairs, I pant a lot.
poj: Góa nā peh lâu-thui ē chin chhoán.
tl: Guá nā peh lâu-thui ē tsin tshuán.

english: He knows how to talk unfortunately he doesn't know how to study.
hanzi: 能言善道的反而不會讀書。
poj: Gâu kóng-ōe-ê tha̍k-chheh soah chhoàn bē-hiáu.
tl: Gâu kóng-uē-ê tha̍k-tsheh suah tshuàn bē-hiáu.

english: I am going to visit a friend.
poj: Góa boeh lâi khì chhōe pêng-iú.
tl: Guá bueh lâi khì tshuē pîng-iú.

english: He is very careless, he spilt soup on the head of the guest.
hanzi: 他很鹵莽，翻倒菜湯在客人的頭上。
poj: I chin chhóng-pōng, chhia-tó chhài-thng tòa lâng-kheh ê thâu-khak-téng.
tl: I tsin tshóng-pōng, tshia-tó tshài-thng tuà lâng-kheh ê thâu-khak-tíng.

poj: Hit tiâu lō͘ ē chhū (chin ku̍t)
tl: Hit tiâu lōo ē tshū (tsin ku̍t)

english: He has made a good disposition of his property.
hanzi: 他的財產處理得很妥善。
poj: I ê châi-sán i chhú-lí kah chin hó-sè.
tl: I ê tsâi-sán i tshú-lí kah tsin hó-sè.

english: He burned my hand with his cigarette.
poj: Góa ê chhiú i ēng hun kā góa chhuh chi̍t ē.
tl: Guá ê tshiú i īng hun kā guá tshuh tsi̍t ē.

english: He owes you money, if you don't push him for payment, he will not pay it back.
hanzi: 他欠你的錢，你若不催促他，他就不還你。
poj: I khiàm lí ê chîⁿ, lí nā bô kā i chhui-chhiok, i chiū m̄ hêng lí.
tl: I khiàm lí ê tsînn, lí nā bô kā i tshui-tshiok, i tsiū m̄ hîng lí.

english: It's very troublesome to carry an umbrella with me, I will run the risk of getting wet.
hanzi: 拿雨傘很麻煩，讓它溼吧！
poj: Gia̍h hō͘-sòaⁿ chin mâ-hoân, chhūn hō͘ tâm.
tl: Gia̍h hōo-suànn tsin mâ-huân, tshūn hōo tâm.

english: How are you going to make things clear to that kind of pest?
hanzi: 那種糾纏不清的人，要如何說得清楚？
poj: Hit khoán kô-kô-tîⁿ ê lâng boeh àn-chóaⁿ kóng ē chhun-chhiaⁿ?
tl: Hit khuán kô-kô-tînn ê lâng bueh àn-tsuánn kóng ē tshun-tshiann?

english: moment of time is an inch of gold
Because it was too expensive, I didn't dare buy it.
hanzi: 因為太貴，我不敢出手買。
poj: In-ūi siuⁿ kùi, góa m̄-káⁿ chhut-chhiú.
tl: In-uī siunn kuì, guá m̄-kánn tshut-tshiú.

english: I'll do the inviting out to eat, you do the paying of the bill, okay?
He lost at gambling and beat his wife to vent his spleen.
hanzi: 他賭輸了錢，打太太出氣。
poj: I poa̍h su kiáu, phah thài-thài chhut-chúi (chhut-khì).
tl: I pua̍h su kiáu, phah thài-thài tshut-tsuí (tshut-khì).

english: An angel appeared to him in a dream.
hanzi: 他在夢中夢見天神出現。
poj: I tī bāng-tiong khòaⁿ-kìⁿ thian-sîn chhut-hiān.
tl: I tī bāng-tiong khuànn-kìnn thian-sîn tshut-hiān.

english: There are inconsistencies in their statements.
poj: In só͘ kóng ê ōe ū chhut-ji̍p.
tl: In sóo kóng ê uē ū tshut-ji̍p.

english: He constantly starts bargaining with a high price, when buying you must haggle with him
hanzi: 他很會開價，你要買時要跟他還價。
poj: I chin gâu kóng-kè, lí boeh bé ê sî tio̍h kā i chhut (chhut-kè).
tl: I tsin gâu kóng-kè, lí bueh bé ê sî tio̍h kā i tshut (tshut-kè).

english: I offered him ten dollars, he still won't sell it.
poj: góa chhut i cha̍p kho͘, i iáu m̄ bē.
tl: guá tshut i tsa̍p khoo, i iáu m̄ bē.

english: I know it's no use to tell you, but I am only letting off steam.
hanzi: 我知道對你說沒有用,我只是說個出氣而已。
poj: Góa chai-iáⁿ tùi lí kóng bô lō͘-ēng, góa kóng chi̍t ē chhut-khùi niā-niā.
tl: Guá tsai-iánn tuì lí kóng bô lōo-īng, guá kóng tsi̍t ē tshut-khuì niā-niā.

english: television sets manufactured by General Electric
That class has perfect attendance today.
He is a graduate of the National University of Taiwan.
poj: I sī Tâi-oân Tāi-ha̍k chhut-sin ê.
tl: I sī Tâi-uân Tāi-ha̍k tshut-sin ê.

english: His wife came from a rich family.
hanzi: 他太太是出身於有錢人家。
poj: In thài-thài sī hó-gia̍h-lâng chhut-sin ê.
tl: In thài-thài sī hó-gia̍h-lâng tshut-sin ê.

english: He watched that girl and went into ecstasy.
hanzi: 他看那個女孩看得入神了（看呆了）。
poj: I khòaⁿ hit ê cha-bó͘-gín-á khòaⁿ kah chhut-sîn.
tl: I khuànn hit ê tsa-bóo-gín-á khuànn kah tshut-sîn.

english: I think better fortune will smile on you next year.
poj: Góa siūⁿ mê-nî lí chiū ē chhut-ūn.
tl: Guá siūnn mê-nî lí tsiū ē tshut-ūn.

english: There is no limit for learning.
woman of easy virtue supposed to be a fox in disguise, enchantress
He said he would come, and he really came
poj: I kóng boeh lâi, chiaⁿ-si̍t lâi a.
tl: I kóng bueh lâi, tsiann-si̍t lâi a.

english: He said it would rain, look, it is raining
hanzi: 他說會下雨，你瞧，果然下雨了。
poj: I kóng ē lo̍h-hō͘, lí khòaⁿ, chiaⁿ-si̍t teh lo̍h a.
tl: I kóng ē lo̍h-hōo, lí khuànn, tsiann-si̍t teh lo̍h a.

english: I am not going until after I have finished eating.
poj: Góa chia̍h pá chiah boeh khì.
tl: Guá tsia̍h pá tsiah bueh khì.

english: be a good eater, have a good appetite
I cannot eat it because it's no good or I have no appetite.
I cannot eat any more because I have had enough.
I have trouble digesting my food.
poj: Góa ê ūi chin lám, chia̍h bē siau-hòa.
tl: Guá ê uī tsin lám, tsia̍h bē siau-huà.

english: May you live to a hundred and twenty.
poj: Hō͘ lí chia̍h kàu (kah) pah-jī hòe. ( Hō͘ lí chia̍h pah-jī)
tl: Hōo lí tsia̍h kàu (kah) pah-jī huè. ( Hōo lí tsia̍h pah-jī)

english: I am very sorry to have kept you waiting for so long.
hanzi: 讓你等了這麼久，真不好意 思。
poj: Hō͘ lí thèng-hāu chiah kú, chin pháiⁿ-sè.
tl: Hōo lí thìng-hāu tsiah kú, tsin pháinn-sè.

english: He is seriously ill, in critical condition
He was seriously injured by a car.
poj: I hō͘ khì-chhia pōng chi̍t ē chin chia̍h-la̍t.
tl: I hōo khì-tshia pōng tsi̍t ē tsin tsia̍h-la̍t.

english: He suffered a great loss in his business.
poj: I liáu chîⁿ liáu kah chin chia̍h-la̍t.
tl: I liáu tsînn liáu kah tsin tsia̍h-la̍t.

english: I am not feeling well, I want to rest for the time being.
hanzi: 我人不舒服，要暫時休息。
poj: Góa lâng bô tú-hó, chiām-sî boeh hioh-khùn.
tl: Guá lâng bô tú-hó, tsiām-sî bueh hioh-khùn.

english: I sent you a book. Did you receive it?
hanzi: 我寄了一本書給你，收到了嗎 ？
poj: Góa ū kià chi̍t pún chheh hō͘ lí, ū chiap tio̍h bô͘?
tl: Guá ū kià tsi̍t pún tsheh hōo lí, ū tsiap tio̍h bôo?

english: I am going to the railway station to meet a friend.
poj: Góa boeh lâi-khì chhia-chām chiap pêng-iú.
tl: Guá bueh lâi-khì tshia-tsām tsiap pîng-iú.

english: Please pass me that package of cigarettes.
hanzi: 那包香煙拜託你遞過來。
poj: Hit pau hun pài-thok lí chiap-kòe-lâi.
tl: Hit pau hun pài-thok lí tsiap-kuè-lâi.

english: For that disease you have to continuously take medicine for a long time then it will get better.
hanzi: 那種病要連續吃藥吃很久才會好。
poj: Hit khoán pēⁿ ài chiap-sòa chia̍h io̍h-á, chia̍h chin kú chiah ē hó.
tl: Hit khuán pēnn ài tsiap-suà tsia̍h io̍h-á, tsia̍h tsin kú tsiah ē hó.

english: If I ask for leave, there's no one to take my place.
hanzi: 我要是請假，沒有人來接替。
poj: Góa nā chhéng-ká, bô lâng thang chiap-thè.
tl: Guá nā tshíng-ká, bô lâng thang tsiap-thè.

english: They keep a well assorted stock at that shop.
poj: Hit khám tiàm ê mi̍h-kiāⁿ chin chiâu.
tl: Hit khám tiàm ê mi̍h-kiānn tsin tsiâu.

english: Not all the students are present.
seasonal rains, rains regular and sufficient
I want to go to the station to meet some visitors.
hanzi: 我要到火車站去接客人。
poj: Góa boeh lâi-khì hóe-chhia-thâu chih lâng-kheh.
tl: Guá bueh lâi-khì hué-tshia-thâu tsih lâng-kheh.

hanzi: 那個醫生看病人診察得很仔細。
poj: Hit ê i-seng khòaⁿ pēⁿ-lâng khòaⁿ-tio̍h chin chim-chiok.
tl: Hit ê i-sing khuànn pēnn-lâng khuànn-tio̍h tsin tsim-tsiok.

poj: I só͘ kóng ê sī chin ê.
tl: I sóo kóng ê sī tsin ê.

english: To study the root of the matter.
poj: Gián-kiù hit hāng tāi-chì ê chin-siòng.
tl: Gián-kiù hit hāng tāi-tsì ê tsin-siòng.

english: use someone for your own advantage, to hurt someone for one's own benefits (Lit. use someone else's fist to carve a stone dragon.)
hanzi: 用別人的拳頭打石獅，損人利己。
poj: iōng pa̍t-lâng ê kûn-thâu-bó cheng chio̍h-sai
tl: iōng pa̍t-lâng ê kûn-thâu-bó tsing tsio̍h-sai

english: That kind of tree always grows out of a crevice.
poj: Hit khoán chhiū-á lóng hoat tī chio̍h-thâu-phāng.
tl: Hit khuán tshiū-á lóng huat tī tsio̍h-thâu-phāng.

hanzi: 他把我的打字機弄壞了。
poj: I chiong góa ê phah-jī-ki phah-hāi khì.
tl: I tsiong guá ê phah-jī-ki phah-hāi khì.

english: I seldom sleep all night without waking up.
poj: Góa chin hán-tit chi̍t-chhéⁿ kàu thiⁿ-kng.
tl: Guá tsin hán-tit tsi̍t-tshénn kàu thinn-kng.

english: He takes medicines all during the year without stopping.
poj: I chi̍t nî tiong chia̍h io̍h-á chia̍h bô hioh-khùn.
tl: I tsi̍t nî tiong tsia̍h io̍h-á tsia̍h bô hioh-khùn.

english: That kind of oppressive person, how can you do anything but meet him on his own terms?
hanzi: 那種不講理的人，除了遷就他以外，還有辦法嗎？
poj: Hit khoán à-pà ê lâng, tî-liáu chiū i í-gōa kám iáu ū pān-hoat?
tl: Hit khuán à-pà ê lâng, tî-liáu tsiū i í-guā kám iáu ū pān-huat?

english: I'll go as soon as I have finished eating.
poj: Góa chia̍h pá chiū boeh khì.
tl: Guá tsia̍h pá tsiū bueh khì.

english: He made a rash promise and then stood back and watched without lifting a finger.
hanzi: 他詛咒別人死，自己袖手旁觀。
poj: I chiù-chōa hō͘ pa̍t-lâng sí, ka-tī chiah khiā koân-soaⁿ khòaⁿ bé sio-that.
tl: I tsiù-tsuā hōo pa̍t-lâng sí, ka-tī tsiah khiā kuân-suann khuànn bé sio-that.

english: a wine drinking game in which two contestants guess at the number of fingers about to be deployed, each putting out one hand and guessing the total (0-10) of the two parties
The ill-mannered child has finished his training yet. (Lit. cow not yet trained)
He disguised himself as a woman.
goods in the original state as made, not dressed up to look better than they are nor flavored to conceal their original flavor
He is working. He is a workman.
I'll make straws for you to draw.
poj: Góa cho khau-á hō͘ lín liu (thiu, liam).
tl: Guá tso khau-á hōo lín liu (thiu, liam).

english: If I come back late, go ahead and eat, you need not wait for me.
hanzi: 我要是晚回來，你們先吃，不用等我。
poj: Góa nā bān tńg-lâi, chò lín chia̍h, m̄-bián tán góa.
tl: Guá nā bān tńg-lâi, tsò lín tsia̍h, m̄-bián tán guá.

english: I'm taking care of the house all by myself, come keep me company.
hanzi: 我自己一個人在 看家，你來跟我作伴。
poj: Góa ka-tī chi̍t ê teh kò͘-chhù, lí lâi kap góa chò-phōaⁿ.
tl: Guá ka-tī tsi̍t ê teh kòo-tshù, lí lâi kap guá tsò-phuānn.

english: He wants to lead others He wants to be boss.
He always wants me to be his opponent.
poj: I tiāⁿ-tiāⁿ ài kap góa chò tùi-thâu.
tl: I tiānn-tiānn ài kap guá tsò tuì-thâu.

english: I want to rent this house out.
poj: Góa chit keng chhù boeh cho͘ lâng (sòe lâng).
tl: Guá tsit king tshù bueh tsoo lâng (suè lâng).

english: I want to rent a house to live in.
poj: Góa boeh cho͘ (sòe) chi̍t keng chhù lâi tòa.
tl: Guá bueh tsoo (suè) tsi̍t king tshù lâi tuà.

english: He dashed water on me with a hose or water pump.
I was cheated out of forty dollars by him.
poj: Góa hō͘ i choán-chia̍h sì-cha̍p kho͘ khì.
tl: Guá hōo i tsuán-tsia̍h sì-tsa̍p khoo khì.

poj: I ê sèⁿ-miā í-keng choa̍t-bāng (choa̍t-bōng) a.
tl: I ê sènn-miā í-king tsua̍t-bāng (tsua̍t-bōng) a.

english: If that kind of animal is not protected it will become extinct.
hanzi: 那種動物若不保護會絕種。
poj: Hit khoán tōng-bu̍t nā bô pó-hō͘ ē choa̍t-chéng.
tl: Hit khuán tōng-bu̍t nā bô pó-hōo ē tsua̍t-tsíng.

english: He severed relations with his older brother a long time ago.
hanzi: 他跟他哥哥斷絕關係很久了。
poj: I kap in a-hiaⁿ choa̍t-iân chin kú à.
tl: I kap in a-hiann tsua̍t-iân tsin kú à.

english: Hereafter I will have nothing to do with you.
He is very clever, but very lazy.
poj: I chin chhong-bêng, chóng-sī chin pīn-tōaⁿ.
tl: I tsin tshong-bîng, tsóng-sī tsin pīn-tuānn.

english: When a child tastes the flavor of food, he cries to eat some more.
hanzi: 小孩吃了嚐到滋味，哭著想再吃。
poj: Gín-ná chia̍h liáu chai chu-bī, khàu boeh koh chia̍h.
tl: Gín-ná tsia̍h liáu tsai tsu-bī, khàu bueh koh tsia̍h.

english: From very early he was that way.
I knew that a long time ago.
It's your own fault, don't blame others for it.
hanzi: 那是你自作孽的，不要怪別人。
poj: He sī lí chū-chok-gia̍t ê, mài koài pa̍t-lâng.
tl: He sī lí tsū-tsok-gia̍t ê, mài kuài pa̍t-lâng.

english: He very responsibly does his own work.
hanzi: 他很知本份做自己的工作。
poj: I chin chū-hūn chò ka-tī ê khang-khòe.
tl: I tsin tsū-hūn tsò ka-tī ê khang-khuè.

english: My chief aim (purpose) is to spread the faith, not to teach English.
hanzi: 我的主要目的是傳教不是教英文。
poj: Góa ê chú-iàu ê bo̍k-tek sī thoân-kàu, m̄ sī kà Eng-gí.
tl: Guá ê tsú-iàu ê bo̍k-tik sī thuân-kàu, m̄ sī kà Ing-gí.

english: He has a good command of Taiwanese.
poj: I ê Tâi-oân-ōe kóng tio̍h chū-iû chū-chāi.
tl: I ê Tâi-uân-uē kóng tio̍h tsū-iû tsū-tsāi.

english: You found that money by chance.
poj: Hiah ê chîⁿ chù-sí hō͘ lí khioh-tio̍h.
tl: Hiah ê tsînn tsù-sí hōo lí khioh-tio̍h.

english: I feel confident that I can do it.
shake or shiver (as from fear, cold, or old age)
I am free. I have nothing to do.
I feel honored to be able to attend this meeting.
hanzi: 我能來參加這個會，很榮幸.
poj: Góa ē-tàng lâi chham-ka chit ê hōe, chin êng-hēng.
tl: Guá ē-tàng lâi tsham-ka tsit ê huē, tsin îng-hīng.

english: I cannot take care of a foreign visitor's needs. (because I don't understand their language or customs).
I was very cold last night, were you?
poj: Góa chang-àm chin kôaⁿ, lí ē kôaⁿ bē?
tl: Guá tsang-àm tsin kuânn, lí ē kuânn bē?

english: I can (know how to) speak Taiwanese.

hanzi: 我的名字你記得嗎？（你記得我的名字嗎？）
poj: Góa ê miâ, lí ē-kì-tit bē ?  (Lí ē-kì-tit góa ê miâ bē ?)
tl: Guá ê miâ, lí ē-kì-tit bē ?  (Lí ē-kì-tit guá ê miâ bē ?)

english: Is it a good idea for you to economize on money for medicine?
That bed is very narrow for three people to sleep on.
hanzi: 那張床如果睡三個人就很窄了.
poj: Hit téng bîn-chhn̂g nā khùn saⁿ ê lâng tō e̍h-chiⁿ-chiⁿ a.
tl: Hit tíng bîn-tshn̂g nā khùn sann ê lâng tō e̍h-tsinn-tsinn a.

english: The plane ought to be here by now, if it took off at nine. (Note: "eng-kai" and "tioh" mean the same thing, but "tioh" is used for emphasis.)
hanzi: 飛機要是九點起飛，現在應該到這兒了.
poj: Hui-ki nā káu-tiám khí-poe, chím-má èng-kai kàu chia a.
tl: Hui-ki nā káu-tiám khí-pue, tsím-má ìng-kai kàu tsia a.

english: If what I do helps people or makes things easier for them, that's all I want.
hanzi: 我做事情如果能夠給予人方便就好。
poj: Góa chò tāi-chì nā ē-tàng èng lâng ê lī-piān tō hó.
tl: Guá tsò tāi-tsì nā ē-tàng ìng lâng ê lī-piān tō hó.

english: feel uncomfortable, uncomfortable to the touch
be very much in the way
It is impossible for this office to grant the permission. (conventional phrase in official communications)
be in the way, be an obstacle to progress, be a problem
low-ranking employees who help run a prison, jailers
stairs, a flight of steps, a ladder, introduction (to subject)
hope against hope, a prize beyond one's reach, unattainable goal (Lit. A stupid dog thinks about pig liver bones.)
idiotic, absurd, stupid (Lit. bonehead and stupid look)
If one wants to avoid seeing dirt, he should turn his eyes away. (a passive way to stay out of trouble)
One who avoids seeing trouble does not have to worry about it.
face (both physically and figuratively), countenance, colors, dyes
Repent and salvation is at hand (Lit. Turn around, there's the shore)
eyes, serve as the eyes of another, a spy, essential points or parts
sharp of sight and quick of hand, see things clearly and act speedily
before the eyes, the present moment
He never looks an inch beyond his nose.
poj: I lóng siūⁿ gán-chiân ê tāi-chì.
tl: I lóng siūnn gán-tsiân ê tāi-tsì.

english: feast for the eyes, delightful to the eye
eyesight, vision, discerning ability, power of judgment
expression of the eyes, gleam in one's eye
in crime investigation, a contact, stool pigeon, informer
supercilious, take no notice of others, arrogant
the most hated person (Lit. thorn (nail) in the eye)
one greatly desired and esteemed, the apple of one's eye
warm with breath like warming freezing hands
descend to earth from heaven (said of supernatural begins in mythology)
inferior position, at a disadvantages, leeward
person who likes and admires Japan and Japanese people or things
earth as seen through the eyes of supernatural beings who are supposed to dwell in the heavens above
descend into this world, come down
summer sanitation, public health in summer months
warn against insubordination, etc, by enforcing strict discipline when one first takes office
go off duty, quit work for the day
lower part of the body, the privates
internal organs usually from pig, cow or chicken
soup made with internal organs usually from pig, cow or chicken
last ten days of a month
get off stage, be driven from office, lost power
conclusion, the end, an exit from the stage, the close of a performance
intimidate, browbeat, frighten, threaten, to bully
being warmed by radiant heat when standing by the stove or radiator
stride or step over a ditch
Can you stride over that ditch?
hanzi: 那條水溝你跨得過去嗎？
poj: Hit tiâu kau-á lí hāⁿ ē kòe bē?
tl: Hit tiâu kau-á lí hānn ē kuè bē?

english: What did you say? (when one has not heard clearly), What? Huh? How? Why? My gosh! (when pronounced very long and drawn out), Here, here, Sir! (when said in amazement or dissatisfaction at another's words)
Huh? You don't know this word?
hanzi: 我的天啊！這句你不懂嗎？
poj: Hăⁿ. Chit kù lí m̄ bat, sī bô͘?
tl: Ha̋nn. Tsit kù lí m̄ bat, sī bôo?

english: He only frightens people, it's not very serious matter.
hanzi: 他是嚇嚇人而已，實在沒什麼。
poj: I sī hó háⁿ-thâu niā-niā, si̍t-chāi bô sím-mih.
tl: I sī hó hánn-thâu niā-niā, si̍t-tsāi bô sím-mih.

english: stride or step over a ditch
fit, suit, agreeable climate, custom, food, dress, shoes, temper, opinion, match with, adjust a thing to another
He and I get along well together.
That coat does not match the skirt.
hanzi: 那件衣服跟那件裙子不相配。
poj: Hit niá saⁿ kap hit niá kûn bô ha̍h.
tl: Hit niá sann kap hit niá kûn bô ha̍h.

english: fit for the purpose, fit for use
suit one's fancy, agreeable to a person or thing
fit for the purpose, fit for use
reasonable in price, worth the cost, worthwhile
fitting well like a dress, form fitting
fit on clothing to see if it fits, suitable clothes for a person
rhyme correctly, as two words, accord or agree in sound or harmony, as voice or instruments
injure, to harm, damage, to kill, cause some one to endure some evil, vital point
make others commit sins or crimes
sea level, surface of the ocean
look for needle in haystack or in the ocean
mirage, image of towns and markets in mirage
lands beyond the sea, foreign countries
very generous, not complaining or competitive
Life will be okay, happy go lucky
To harm another is to harm oneself.
hanzi: 害人則害己，害別人反害己。
poj: Hāi jîn chek hāi kí, hāi pa̍t-lâng ka-tī sí.
tl: Hāi jîn tsik hāi kí, hāi pa̍t-lâng ka-tī sí.

english: benefit oneself at the expense of others
as boundless as sea and sky
restrictions at ports of entry and exit
He is so frugal he still rides an old and shabby bicycle.
hanzi: 他很節儉，一部腳踏車那麼老舊了，還在騎。
poj: I chiok khiām ê, chi̍t tâi thih-bé hāi-koài-koài mā iáu teh khiâ.
tl: I tsiok khiām ê, tsi̍t tâi thih-bé hāi-kuài-kuài mā iáu teh khiâ.

english: Department of the Navy (especially of the United States)
public nuisance, public enemy (a horse that troubles the whole herd)
harm or injure others, inflict injury upon others, involve others in troubles
god of ocean and rain, Neptune
decline one's favorite food or thing (Neptune declines water.)
He joined the Marines so he has to learn how to swim.
hanzi: 他去當海軍陸戰隊，所以得學游泳。
poj: I khì chò hái-lio̍k-á, só͘-í ài o̍h siû-chúi.
tl: I khì tsò hái-lio̍k-á, sóo-í ài o̍h siû-tsuí.

english: great capacity for alcoholic drinks (capacity as big as the sea)
sandy area of the beach, portion of shore left dry at low tide
five thousand feet above sea level
cause some one's death with poison, plots etc
bring great trouble to others, kill a person
fresh sea food, sea food delicacies
I will remain faithful to you even if the sea dries up and stones rots.
poj: hái ta chio̍h nōa, hái ko͘ se̍k lān
tl: hái ta tsio̍h nuā, hái koo si̍k lān

english: impossible to find (look for a needle in the sea)
coarser kind of sea weed, seldom eaten
He is groaning in his bed.
That child is groaning because he has a belly ache.
poj: Hit ê gín-ná teh haiⁿ pak-tó͘ thiàⁿ.
tl: Hit ê gín-ná teh hainn pak-tóo thiànn.

english: He is grumbling because he has no money.
He's very good to himself, if does just a little work he complains.
hanzi: 他很愛惜生命，稍微做一下，就叫苦連天。
poj: I chin sioh sèⁿ-miā, sió-khóa chò chi̍t-ē chiū haiⁿ-haiⁿ-kiò.
tl: I tsin sioh sènn-miā, sió-khuá tsò tsi̍t-ē tsiū hainn-hainn-kiò.

english: shake one's head in despair, sigh unhappily
buy the bridal outfit, a girl preparing for marriage
study, learn, imitate, academic, branch of learning
school discipline, the traditions of a school, academic traditions
seat of learning, institute of higher learning
study for the purpose of application
have acquired a specialty from study
Move ahead or be pushed backwards. (Learning is like sailing a boat up stream.)
diploma mill, a school that is interested in making money in total disregard of the student's scholastic progress
student demonstrations, such as strikes, etc
hammer down, beat (downward) with a cane or a stone (see "kong")
generous, open handed, untruthfully boastful, exaggerated, swollen from disease
He does not care about anything. He does everything carelessly.
hold in the mouth, contain, include, to bear, imply, and, with
letter, correspondence, contain, to envelop, magnanimous
sink, to fall, harm another with trumped up charges, drop into, entrap, beguile

hanzi: 他的台語（他講台語）很差勁。
poj: I ê Tâi-oân-ōe (I kóng Tâi-oân-ōe) chin ham-bān.
tl: I ê Tâi-uân-uē (I kóng Tâi-uân-uē) tsin ham-bān.

english: to smile, to grin, with a smile, smilingly
be able to smile in Hades, die with satisfaction
entrap or to ensnare a person, cause some one to endure some evil
not substantial, bear no fruit, exaggerate
capability for kindness, patient, lenient, tolerant or broad minded under all circumstances without showing one's inner feelings, cherish and nourish
He is a cultured man, a good natured man.
get into extreme difficulty, be drawn into a hopeless situation
calculate mentally, (hold the account in one's mouth)
reckless and careless in managing affairs, absurd, nonsensical
fall or a surrender of a castle, sinking of the earth, fall into vice or sin
be the victim of an unjust charge
unable to clear oneself of a false accusation or to redress a wrong
be cracked earthenware, a crack in a piece of earthenware
The weak last longer. (Lit. Cracked earthenware lasts longer.)
deep, abstruse, reserved in manners or speech
Han dynasty, of the Chinese people or language, a man, a fellow
leisure, spare time, quiet, tranquil, calm
limited number of days, a limited term or length time
there is a limit, not very much or many
drought, dry, go by land route as opposed to waterway
restriction, a limit, ration, to restrict, to limit
rice and sweet potatoes boiled to congee
to make trouble, a nuisance, silly
It happens every little once in a while.
idlers, persons with nothing to do
Out of Bounds to Non-authorized Personnel! No Admittance
set a time limit, restricted in time
come around once in a great while
Once in a great while he comes.
change of seasons, lapse of time (The cold comes and the heat departs.)
Cold Dew, a solar period that arrives about October 8-22
private school, "hedge" school, class conducted at a temple to learn Chinese
fix or set the time, set a time limit or deadline
very niggardly, over cautious, mean, shy
once in a great while, rarely, occasionally
You rarely come, you should stay and eat.
hanzi: 難得來一次，該留下吃飯。
poj: Hán-tit tang-sî lâi, taⁿ tio̍h tòa le chia̍h.
tl: Hán-tit tang-sî lâi, tann tio̍h tuà le tsia̍h.

poj: Góa ê hān-tō͘ kàu chia niā-niā.
tl: Guá ê hān-tōo kàu tsia niā-niā.

english: to warm by the fire, to toast, to dry by the fire
intimidate, browbeat, frighten, threaten, to bully
swell up from a blow or a poisonous bite, swollen
surrender, submit to being conquered, to descend
row, line, series, business firm, company, a trade, generation, to walk, to go, to act
end of a lane or alley
market prices of a commodity, general standing of a person in term of finance, influence, popularity, etc.
be generous, vehement fervent liberal, unselfish
A person can distinguish himself in any profession. (Every business has its master.)
warm by a fire, to dry some thing by the fire, to toast
grown very fat on milk like an infant
rank and file, rows and columns
small portable earthen stove for boiling tea water
routes (of an airline or shipping company)
distance of an air or sea trip
catch an insect with the palm downward, to net a bird or butterfly
combine, unite, to gather, to collect, to close, shut
harmony, unity, in harmony or accord with
stay if the condition is agreeable and to leave if it's otherwise
poj: ha̍p chek liû, put-ha̍p chek khì.
tl: ha̍p tsik liû, put-ha̍p tsik khì.

english: clasp the hands like Buddhist priests do
bury in a common grave, mass burial
run a business in partnership with someone
joint consultation as apposed to a dictatorship)
suit one's fancy, find something agreeable
contract, agreement, to conclude a contract
sum, in all, total, sum up
pass an exam or test, be found qualified for a post, be acceptable
cooperate, collaborate, unite efforts, (in physics, the resultant of more than one force)
chat, talk about anything at all, chew the rag or fat
When I have time, I always go to chat with him.
hanzi: 我要是有空都去跟他聊天。
poj: Góa nā ū êng lóng khì kap i hap-sian.
tl: Guá nā ū îng lóng khì kap i hap-sian.

english: shout, bawl, to roar at, to thunder at, to say disagreeable things, speak loud and angrily
I told him not to do it and he got angry at me.
hanzi: 我勸他不要這樣，反而被他責怪。
poj: Góa kiò i m̄-thang án-ne, tian-tò hō͘ i hat.
tl: Guá kiò i m̄-thang án-ne, tian-tò hōo i hat.

english: That employer get angry at his workers very easily.
poj: Hit ê thâu-ke chin gâu kā lâng hat.
tl: Hit ê thâu-ke tsin gâu kā lâng hat.

english: roar at, speak loud and angrily
filial piety, act in a filial manner, worship with offerings
wait, expect, a period, situation, condition, greet, inquire after
imitate, follow, effect, effectiveness, efficacy, devote, to offer
pinched, squeezed between, wedged or sandwiched between, hold between the fingers of the hand, to pick up or hold something with pinchers or chopsticks
clever, wise, skillful, be good at doing or making (something)
lagging, always procrastinating, diligent but slow in action
complain of unfair treatment, discrimination or undeserved punishment, like to complain
It isn't that he doesn't have any money, he just likes to complain.
hanzi: 他是很會抱怨而已，不是沒有錢。
poj: I sī gâu-haiⁿ niā-niā, m̄-sī bô chîⁿ.
tl: I sī gâu-hainn niā-niā, m̄-sī bô tsînn.

english: spends a lot of money, likes to spend money
very superstitious and observant of old rites, believe in omens
fond of making a racket, fond of making practical jokes or playing tricks
fond of quibbling, catch (a person) in his own words, trip (a person) up
good at planning or scheming (often with idea of cunning)
lagging, always procrastinating, slow in action
be an eyesore, hurts to look at
back part of the lower jaw
artistic or literary salon, art gallery
Department of Fine Arts (college or university)
