tl: Hit khám tiàm (i ê sing-lí) tsin ka-la̍h.

english: That dog is clenching a piece of meat in its month and will not leave loose of it.
hanzi: 那隻狗一塊肉咬得緊緊的，都不肯放。
poj: Hit chiah káu chi̍t tè bah kā tiâu-tiâu, lóng m̄-káⁿ pàng.
tl: Hit tsiah káu tsi̍t tè bah kā tiâu-tiâu, lóng m̄-kánn pàng.

english: work holding an infant with one arm
Are there any accessories which go with that machine?
hanzi: 那部機器有沒有配零件？
poj: Hit tâi ki-khì ū kah lêng-kiāⁿ bô͘?
tl: Hit tâi ki-khì ū kah lîng-kiānn bôo?

english: How much is the dowry of the bride?
take good ones and bad ones on an average

poj: Góa iau kah boeh sí khì.
tl: Guá iau kah bueh sí khì.

english: It is (was) so hot that I can (could) not sleep.
It is (was) so hot that I can (could) not endure it.
poj: Góa joa̍h kah tòng bē tiâu.
tl: Guá jua̍h kah tòng bē tiâu.

english: Her daughter-in-law does not please her.
Since he is sick, he certainly cannot be here.
hanzi: 他既然生病了，一定不能來。
poj: I kah-sī (kì-jiân) teh phòa-pēⁿ, it-tēng bē-tàng lâi.
tl: I kah-sī (kì-jiân) teh phuà-pēnn, it-tīng bē-tàng lâi.

english: Since he doesn't want to come, don't go and call him again.
hanzi: 他既然不來，不要再去叫他。
poj: I kah-sī m̄ lâi, mài koh khì kiò i.
tl: I kah-sī m̄ lâi, mài koh khì kiò i.

english: How many stories are there in that building?
poj: Hit keng chhù ū kúi kai (chàn)?
tl: Hit king tshù ū kuí kai (tsàn)?

english: I am going to the fifth floor.
If I speak (write) incorrectly, please correct me.
hanzi: 我要是說（寫）錯了，請你改正。
poj: Góa nā kóng (siá) m̄-tio̍h, chhiáⁿ lí kā góa kái.
tl: Guá nā kóng (siá) m̄-tio̍h, tshiánn lí kā guá kái.

english: The railway timetable has been revised.
He had a traffic accident but fortunately was not killed.
hanzi: 他發生交通事故，僥倖沒死。
poj: I hoat-seng kau-thong sū-kò͘, kai-chài bô sí khì. (bô sí chin kai-chài)
tl: I huat-sing kau-thong sū-kòo, kai-tsài bô sí khì. (bô sí tsin kai-tsài)

hanzi: 我給你介紹這位是陳先生。
poj: Góa kā lí kài-siāu, chit ūi sī Tân Sian-siⁿ.
tl: Guá kā lí kài-siāu, tsit uī sī Tân Sian-sinn.

english: They are ready to fight for the world peace.
hanzi: 他們覺悟要為世界的和平而戰。
poj: In kak-gō͘ boeh ūi sè-kài ê hô-pêng chiàn-cheng.
tl: In kak-gōo bueh uī sè-kài ê hô-pîng tsiàn-tsing.

english: I think we have no ray of hope. All of you must be resolved to meet the worst (as those on a lifeboat).
hanzi: 我看沒有希望了，你們要覺悟。
poj: Góa khòaⁿ bô bāng a, lín tāi-ke tio̍h kak-gō͘ .
tl: Guá khuànn bô bāng a, lín tāi-ke tio̍h kak-gōo .

english: Are you really willing to give that dog to somebody else?
poj: Hit chiah káu lí kám kam hō͘ lâng?
tl: Hit tsiah káu lí kám kam hōo lâng?

english: That child is so small, are you willing to let him go to the States alone?
hanzi: 你捨得讓他一個人去美國嗎？
poj: Hit ê gín-á hiah sè-hàn, lí kam hō͘ i ka-tī chi̍t ê khì Bí-kok, sī bô͘?
tl: Hit ê gín-á hiah sè-hàn, lí kam hōo i ka-tī tsi̍t ê khì Bí-kok, sī bôo?

english: I am unwilling to give this kitten to somebody.
hanzi: 我這隻小貓捨不得給人。
poj: Góa chit chiah niau-á-kiáⁿ m̄-kam hō͘ lâng.
tl: Guá tsit tsiah niau-á-kiánn m̄-kam hōo lâng.

english: I got my bicycle stolen, I am still attached to it.
hanzi: 我的自行車被偷了，實在很捨不得。
poj: Góa ê thih-bé hō͘ lâng thau-khan khì, chin m̄-kam.
tl: Guá ê thih-bé hōo lâng thau-khan khì, tsin m̄-kam.

english: I feel honored to attend this meeting.
hanzi: 我能來參加這個會，感到很榮幸（光榮）。
poj: Góa ē-tàng lâi chham-ka chit ê hōe, kám-kak chin êng-hēng (kong-êng).
tl: Guá ē-tàng lâi tsham-ka tsit ê huē, kám-kak tsin îng-hīng (kong-îng).

hanzi: 早上 我覺得不太舒服。
poj: Góa chái-khí kám-kak bô sím-mih sóng-khoài.
tl: Guá tsái-khí kám-kak bô sím-mih sóng-khuài.

english: give a deep impression to a person
It's admirable that you remembered it.
You can not skip that sentence.
be degraded, have one's salary cut

poj: I bô ài kap lâng kau-chè.
tl: I bô ài kap lâng kau-tsè.

english: strong wind blows and heavy rain falls (at the same time)
That guy is so much like a monkey, how can he relax?
hanzi: 那個人那麼急性，怎麼閒得下來？
poj: Hit ê lâng hiah-ni̍h kâu-sèng, ná êng ē tiâu?
tl: Hit ê lâng hiah-ni̍h kâu-sìng, ná îng ē tiâu?

english: That untrustworthy a person, do you dare entrust your work to him.
hanzi: 那麼無信用的人，你也敢託付他。
poj: Hiah-ni̍h bô sìn-iōng ê lâng, lí iā káⁿ kau-tiāng i.
tl: Hiah-ni̍h bô sìn-iōng ê lâng, lí iā kánn kau-tiāng i.

english: be run over by a car
He is complaining about his small salary.
poj: I teh ka̍uh kóng goe̍h-kip siuⁿ chió.
tl: I teh ka̍uh kóng gue̍h-kip siunn tsió.

english: He is going to marry his daughter off tomorrow.
She is going to be married tomorrow.
wear a cangue, carry an extra burden
try every possible means (to get what our heart is set on)
On account of my illness, I spent over a hundred dollars more than usual this month.
hanzi: 因為生病，這個月多花一百多塊。
poj: In-ūi phòa-pēⁿ, chit kó͘-goe̍h ke-khai pah gōa kho͘.
tl: In-uī phuà-pēnn, tsit kóo-gue̍h ke-khai pah guā khoo.

english: Whenever he is free, he sleeps as long as he can.
hanzi: 他要是一有空就盡量睡。
poj: I nā ū êng ê sî ke-kiám khùn.
tl: I nā ū îng ê sî ke-kiám khùn.

english: He has never been here to lay an egg, whenever he comes, he leaves chicken droppings. ─ He is a troublesome person.
poj: I m̄-bat lâi siⁿ ke-nn̄g, lóng lâi pàng ke-sái.
tl: I m̄-bat lâi sinn ke-nn̄g, lóng lâi pàng ke-sái.

english: He only pretends that he is sick. He does not know.
If he is not happy, he won't have anything to do with anyone.
poj: I nā teh bô hoaⁿ-hí, lóng mā ké-sí ka-lí.
tl: I nā teh bô huann-hí, lóng mā ké-sí ka-lí.

english: Just darn the (little) hole with thread, you don't have to put a patch on it.
hanzi: 那個洞用線織就行，不用補。
poj: Hit khang iōng sòaⁿ kā góa keⁿ chiū hó, m̄-bián pó͘.
tl: Hit khang iōng suànn kā guá kenn tsiū hó, m̄-bián póo.

poj: Góa eng-àm boeh tòa Tâi-pak keh-mê.
tl: Guá ing-àm bueh tuà Tâi-pak keh-mê.

english: There is an estrangement between those two persons.
poj: In nn̄g ê ê tiong-kan ū keh-mo̍͘h.
tl: In nn̄g ê ê tiong-kan ū keh-mo̍oh.

english: He likes to play the fool (to jest). He is a clown.
I paid (returned) him the money through the hands of his wife.
hanzi: 那筆錢我有還他，是他太太經手的。
poj: Hit tiâu chîⁿ góa ū hêng i, sī in thài-thài keng-chhiú ê.
tl: Hit tiâu tsînn guá ū hîng i, sī in thài-thài king-tshiú ê.

english: How many rooms has the house?
poj: Hit keng chhù ū lōa-chē keng-keh?
tl: Hit king tshù ū luā-tsē king-keh?

english: A disobedient child will be spanked.
hanzi: 不聽話的孩子會被打屁股。
poj: Gín-á nā m̄ thiaⁿ lâng ê ōe ē hō͘ lâng phah kha-chhng.
tl: Gín-á nā m̄ thiann lâng ê uē ē hōo lâng phah kha-tshng.

english: I want to ask you a question, I wonder if this will be a little impolite.
hanzi: 我想問你一句話，不知會失禮嗎？
poj: Góa boeh mn̄g lí chi̍t kù ōe, m̄-chai ē khah sit-lé bē?
tl: Guá bueh mn̄g lí tsi̍t kù uē, m̄-tsai ē khah sit-lé bē?

english: The stove pipe always clogs up with soot.
Lately I have been less likely to get sick.
He was a teacher at our school before.
hanzi: 他過去在我們學校教書。
poj: I khah-chá tī lán ha̍k-hāu teh kà-chheh.
tl: I khah-tsá tī lán ha̍k-hāu teh kà-tsheh.

english: He is not as diligent as he used to.
hanzi: 他不像以前那麼勤勉了。
poj: I bô chhin-chhiūⁿ khah-chá hiah kut-la̍t a.
tl: I bô tshin-tshiūnn khah-tsá hiah kut-la̍t a.

english: I am rather good at playing basketball, I am not so good at swimming.
hanzi: 我較會打籃球，較不會游泳。
poj: Góa khah ē-hiáu phah nâ-kiû, khah bē-hiáu siû-chúi.
tl: Guá khah ē-hiáu phah nâ-kiû, khah bē-hiáu siû-tsuí.

english: It rains more in summer, less in winter.
hanzi: 夏天較會下雨，冬天較不會下雨。
poj: Joa̍h-thiⁿ khah ē lo̍h-hō͘, kôaⁿ-thiⁿ khah bē lo̍h-hō͘.
tl: Jua̍h-thinn khah ē lo̍h-hōo, kuânn-thinn khah bē lo̍h-hōo.

english: His strength is superior to that of five men.
hanzi: 他的力量勝過五個人的力量。
poj: I ê la̍t khah iâⁿ gō͘ ê lâng ê la̍t.
tl: I ê la̍t khah iânn gōo ê lâng ê la̍t.

english: He will be back very shortly.
He is rather wealthy, I have not too much money.
hanzi: 他比較有錢，我不怎麼有錢。
poj: I khah ū chîⁿ, góa khah bô chîⁿ.
tl: I khah ū tsînn, guá khah bô tsînn.

english: I have more free time on Sunday, on weekdays I am rather busy.
hanzi: 我禮拜天比較有空，平常較忙。
poj: Góa lé-pài-ji̍t khah ū êng, phó͘-thong-ji̍t khah bô êng.
tl: Guá lé-pài-ji̍t khah ū îng, phóo-thong-ji̍t khah bô îng.

english: I don't know what he is angry about, no matter how much (often) I call him he does not answer.
hanzi: 我不知他在氣什麼，再怎麼叫也不回答。
poj: Góa m̄-chai i teh siū-khì siáⁿ-hòe, khah kiò iā m̄ ìn.
tl: Guá m̄-tsai i teh siū-khì siánn-huè, khah kiò iā m̄ ìn.

english: We came here first to get things started.
hanzi: 我們最先來這裡開基的。
poj: Goán siōng tāi-seng lâi chia khai-ki ê.
tl: Guán siōng tāi-sing lâi tsia khai-ki ê.

english: come (fall, peel, shell) off (as paint, plaster, skin)
I am too weak to do this kind of job.
hanzi: 我的身體擔當不了這種工作。
poj: Góa ê seng-khu bē-kham-tit chò chit khoán ê khang-khòe.
tl: Guá ê sing-khu bē-kham-tit tsò tsit khuán ê khang-khuè.

english: I am unqualified to be your teacher.
poj: Góa bē-kham-tit chò lí ê lāu-su.
tl: Guá bē-kham-tit tsò lí ê lāu-su.

english: I am overwhelmed with gratitude to be served tea by you (said to a superior).
poj: Hō͘ lí thîn tê, chin bē-kham-tit.
tl: Hōo lí thîn tê, tsin bē-kham-tit.

english: He is a notch above the others.
poj: I pí kî-tha ê lâng koân chi̍t khám.
tl: I pí kî-tha ê lâng kuân tsi̍t khám.

english: Through his good offices I made a lot of money.
poj: I khan-khioh góa thàn chin-chē chîⁿ.
tl: I khan-khioh guá thàn tsin-tsē tsînn.

english: He patronized many orphans. (as giving them living expenses, school expenses etc.)
He is stretched out on the bed on his stomach reading a book.
poj: I khap tī bîn-chhn̂g-téng teh khòaⁿ-chheh.
tl: I khap tī bîn-tshn̂g-tíng teh khuànn-tsheh.

english: I have a bowl of soup in my hands, don't bump into me.
hanzi: 我手裡端著一碗菜湯，你不要碰我。
poj: Góa chhiú-ni̍h phâng chi̍t óaⁿ chhài-thng, lí m̄-thang kā góa kha̍p-tio̍h.
tl: Guá tshiú-ni̍h phâng tsi̍t uánn tshài-thng, lí m̄-thang kā guá kha̍p-tio̍h.

english: I barely touched him with my motor-bike, I did not run over him nor did I collide with him.
hanzi: 我的機車只稍為擦到他，沒有輾到他，也沒有撞到他。
poj: Góa ê o͘-thó͘-bái sió-khóa kā i kha̍p-tio̍h niā-niā, bô kā i kauh-tio̍h, iā bô kā i pōng-tio̍h.
tl: Guá ê oo-thóo-bái sió-khuá kā i kha̍p-tio̍h niā-niā, bô kā i kauh-tio̍h, iā bô kā i pōng-tio̍h.

english: She feels jealous because I am wearing a new dress.
poj: Góa chhēng sin-saⁿ, i teh bē-khat-tit.
tl: Guá tshīng sin-sann, i teh bē-khat-tit.

english: I gave you money and didn't give him, therefore he is jealous.
hanzi: 我錢給你，沒有給他，他在嫉妒。
poj: Góa chîⁿ hō͘ lí, bô hō͘ i, i teh bē-khat-tit.
tl: Guá tsînn hōo lí, bô hōo i, i teh bē-khat-tit.

english: Pull that plant up by the roots.
He is speaking ironically, not praising me.
hanzi: 他是在諷刺我，不是在稱讚我。
poj: I teh kā góa khau, m̄-sī teh kā góa o-ló.
tl: I teh kā guá khau, m̄-sī teh kā guá o-ló.

english: There is a faint trace of an American accent in his Taiwanese.
poj: I ê Tâi-oân-ōe ū chi̍t-sut-á Bí-kok-khiuⁿ.
tl: I ê Tâi-uân-uē ū tsi̍t-sut-á Bí-kok-khiunn.

english: He talks as if he knew everything.
hanzi: 他的口氣像似每樣都知道。
poj: I ê kháu-khì chhin-chhiūⁿ ta̍k hāng lóng chai-iáⁿ.
tl: I ê kháu-khì tshin-tshiūnn ta̍k hāng lóng tsai-iánn.

english: He is speaking of me ironically.
chair is stuck (caught) on the leg of the table.
When will he start on his journey?
The kite is caught in a tree.
A fish bone is stuck in the throat.
hanzi: 魚刺哽在喉嚨，喉嚨哽著魚刺
poj: Hî-chhì khê tī nâ-âu, (Nâ-âu khê-tio̍h hî-chhì.)
tl: Hî-tshì khê tī nâ-âu, (Nâ-âu khê-tio̍h hî-tshì.)

english: He talks in a very polite way.
He is very diligent. He is willing to do every thing.
He neither affirmed nor denied it.
hanzi: 他沒有肯定，也沒有否定。
poj: I iā bô khéng-tēng, iā bô hó͘-tēng.
tl: I iā bô khíng-tīng, iā bô hóo-tīng.

english: That pillar is slanting a bit.
His company is downtown, and his residence is in a country place.
hanzi: 他的公司在市內，住宅在鄉下
poj: I ê kong-si tī chhī-lāi, khiā-ke tī chhân-chng.
tl: I ê kong-si tī tshī-lāi, khiā-ke tī tshân-tsng.

english: That building is not suitable for a residence.
poj: Hit keng chò khiā-ke-chhù bô ha̍h.
tl: Hit king tsò khiā-ke-tshù bô ha̍h.

english: That kid can stand on his head for a long time.
hanzi: 那個孩子倒立能站很久。
poj: Hit ê gín-á khiā-sì-thêng ē-tàng khiā chin kú.
tl: Hit ê gín-á khiā-sì-thîng ē-tàng khiā tsin kú.

english: Short of kneeling, I besought him with all my powers.
poj: Góa khiàm chi̍t kūi kā i khún-kiû.
tl: Guá khiàm tsi̍t kuī kā i khún-kiû.

english: He is good at telling a story.
He gets angry that easily, I don't dare joke with him.
hanzi: 他那麼容易生氣，我不敢跟他開玩笑。
poj: I hiah-ni̍h khiàu-thâu, góa m̄-káⁿ kah i kóng-chhiò.
tl: I hiah-ni̍h khiàu-thâu, guá m̄-kánn kah i kóng-tshiò.

english: I want to go, but he doesn't.
poj: Góa boeh khì, i khiok m̄ khì.
tl: Guá bueh khì, i khiok m̄ khì.

english: That foreigner speaks Taiwanese like a native.
hanzi: 那個外國人講臺灣話都沒有腔調。
poj: Hit ê gōa-kok-lâng kóng Tâi-oân-ōe lóng bô khiuⁿ.
tl: Hit ê guā-kok-lâng kóng Tâi-uân-uē lóng bô khiunn.

english: I will put it under the desk (future tense).
I put it under the desk (past tense).
I'll knock you down with a rock.
I will take university entrance examination.
I'll give you a test in English.
poj: Góa boeh kā lín khó Eng-gí.
tl: Guá bueh kā lín khó Ing-gí.

english: It is a pity that he has no parents.
poj: I bô pē bô bú, chin khó-lîn.
tl: I bô pē bô bú, tsin khó-lîn.

poj: Hit kha tháng tio̍h iōng iân-sòaⁿ kho͘ le.
tl: Hit kha tháng tio̍h iōng iân-suànn khoo le.

english: He did not listen to my advice.
poj: I bô (boeh) thiaⁿ góa ê khó͘-khǹg.
tl: I bô (bueh) thiann guá ê khóo-khǹg.

english: Jesus suffered many hardships for mankind.
Because it is (was) very dark, I cannot (couldn't) see it distinctly.
poj: In-ūi chin àm, góa khòaⁿ bē chheng-chhó.
tl: In-uī tsin àm, guá khuànn bē tshing-tshó.

english: Because I was in a hurry, I did not see it clearly.
hanzi: 因為趕時間，我沒看清楚。
poj: In-ūi sî-kan teh kóaⁿ, góa khòaⁿ bē chheng-chhó.
tl: In-uī sî-kan teh kuánn, guá khuànn bē tshing-tshó.

english: Can you distinguish good people from bad people?
When I went up to the mountains, I saw the Aborigines.
hanzi: 我去山上的時候，看到了原住民。
poj: Góa khì soaⁿ-téng ê sî, ū khòaⁿ-kìⁿ goân-chū-bîn.
tl: Guá khì suann-tíng ê sî, ū khuànn-kìnn guân-tsū-bîn.

english: Only his outward appearance is good.

poj: Hit ê lâng sī sím-mih khoán-sit?
tl: Hit ê lâng sī sím-mih khuán-sit?

english: He doesn't know how to entertain visitors.
He is very easy to please. He is not fastidious.
He is hard to please. He is fastidious.
Our company has no vacancy at present.
I am one hundred dollars short.
He is a clown. He is a jester.
My grandfather is still very healthy.
I planted vegetables in this field and sugarcane in that field.
hanzi: 我這一塊種菜，那一塊種甘蔗。
poj: Góa chit khu chèng chhài, hit khu chèng kam-chià.
tl: Guá tsit khu tsìng tshài, hit khu tsìng kam-tsià.

english: He went to the toilet several times this morning.
hanzi: 他早上上了好幾次廁所。

english: At first he offered it for 40 dollars.
Don't just hit a child, for better results explain why its wrong and how to change.
hanzi: 小孩子不要只用打的，應解釋給他聽才有用。
poj: Gín-á mài kan-na iōng phah ê, ài khui-phòa hō͘ i thiaⁿ chiah ū hāu.
tl: Gín-á mài kan-na iōng phah ê, ài khui-phuà hōo i thiann tsiah ū hāu.

english: Tie those bamboo sticks up into a bundle.
Last night I did not get enough sleep.
poj: Góa chang-àm khùn bô kàu bîn.
tl: Guá tsang-àm khùn bô kàu bîn.

english: follow someone and have a share in the profits
Since he is not coming, we need not wait for him.
hanzi: 他既然不來，我們不用等他
poj: I kí-jiân m̄ lâi, lán m̄-bián tán i.
tl: I kí-jiân m̄ lâi, lán m̄-bián tán i.

english: within a definite period of time
The assembly was thrown into uproar
Her bone structure is very delicate.
Just darn the (little) hole with thread, you don't have to put a patch on it.
hanzi: 那洞用線織就好，不用補。
poj: Hit khang ēng sòaⁿ kā góa kiⁿ chiū hó, m̄-bián pó͘.
tl: Hit khang īng suànn kā guá kinn tsiū hó, m̄-bián póo.

english: He would like to see the president, but the president doesn't want to see him (grant him an interview).
hanzi: 他要來謁見總統，可是總統不要接見他。
poj: I boeh lâi kìⁿ chóng-thóng, m̄-kú chóng-thóng bô ài kìⁿ i.
tl: I bueh lâi kìnn tsóng-thóng, m̄-kú tsóng-thóng bô ài kìnn i.

english: Whenever he comes, I am not at home.
poj: I kìⁿ lâi, góa kìⁿ bô tī lē.
tl: I kìnn lâi, guá kìnn bô tī lē.

english: I am going to mail a letter, and I am also going to the bank to deposit some money.
hanzi: 我要去寄信，也要去銀行存錢。
poj: Góa boeh lâi-khì kià-phe, iā boeh lâi-khì gîn-hâng kià-chîⁿ.
tl: Guá bueh lâi-khì kià-phe, iā bueh lâi-khì gîn-hâng kià-tsînn.

english: I will leave this bike of mine in your care. Please watch it for me.
hanzi: 我這輛腳踏車寄放在你這裡。
poj: Góa chit tâi thih-bé kià lí.
tl: Guá tsit tâi thih-bé kià lí.

english: My family location is registered temporarily at my relatives.
hanzi: 我的戶口寄留在親戚那裡。
poj: Góa ê hō͘-kháu kià-liû tī chhin-chiâⁿ hia.
tl: Guá ê hōo-kháu kià-liû tī tshin-tsiânn hia.

english: He is very henpecked so if you want to determine things you have to arrange matters with his wife.
hanzi: 他是怕太太大王，所以要跟他太太商量比較有用。
poj: I sī kiaⁿ-bó͘ tāi-ông, só͘-í ài kap in thài-thài chham-siông khah ū-hāu.
tl: I sī kiann-bóo tāi-ông, sóo-í ài kap in thài-thài tsham-siông khah ū-hāu.

english: You (It frightened me). You gave me a quite a start.
Tie the dog up lest it should bite someone.
hanzi: 那隻狗得綁起來，恐怕會咬人。
poj: Hit chiah káu tio̍h pa̍k-khí-lâi, kiaⁿ-íⁿ ē kā lâng.
tl: Hit tsiah káu tio̍h pa̍k-khí-lâi, kiann-ínn ē kā lâng.

english: I am not afraid of death.
the vice-president holds an additional post of premier
One of my books is missing.
poj: Góa ê chheh kiám chi̍t pún.
tl: Guá ê tsheh kiám tsi̍t pún.

english: Whenever he did wrong, I punished him.
poj: I kiàn chò m̄-tio̍h, góa kiàn kā i hoa̍t.
tl: I kiàn tsò m̄-tio̍h, guá kiàn kā i hua̍t.

english: Whenever she looks at this picture, she cries.
hanzi: 他每次見到這張照片就哭。
poj: I kiàn khòaⁿ-tio̍h chit tiuⁿ siòng, kiàn khàu.
tl: I kiàn khuànn-tio̍h tsit tiunn siòng, kiàn khàu.

english: He was lazy about studying, consequently he remained in the same class.

hanzi: 他在讀書（睡），不要打擾他。
poj: I teh tha̍k-chheh (khùn), mài kā i kiáu-jiáu.
tl: I teh tha̍k-tsheh (khùn), mài kā i kiáu-jiáu.

english: Want to go the toilet badly.
He has never been here at all.
poj: I kin-pún m̄-bat lâi kàu chia.
tl: I kin-pún m̄-bat lâi kàu tsia.

english: When I talk in Taiwanese I become tense.
poj: Góa kóng Tâi-oân-ōe ê sî, ē kín-tiuⁿ.
tl: Guá kóng Tâi-uân-uē ê sî, ē kín-tiunn.

english: He is called by the name of "A-ki".
I hold it in common with him.
poj: He sī góa kap i kiōng-iú ê.
tl: He sī guá kap i kiōng-iú ê.

english: Is it possible for us not to complain about him taking that much.
hanzi: 給他佔那麼便宜，不跟他計較怎麼可以？
poj: Hō͘ i phiⁿ hiah chē bô kap i kiù-sú ná ē-ēng-tit?
tl: Hōo i phinn hiah tsē bô kap i kiù-sú ná ē-īng-tit?

english: Roll up that rug for me.
poj: Hit niá tē-thán kā góa kńg khí-lâi.
tl: Hit niá tē-thán kā guá kńg khí-lâi.

poj: Góa boeh kò lí (kā lí kò).
tl: Guá bueh kò lí (kā lí kò).

poj: I ê ki-su̍t si̍t-chāi chin ko-bêng.
tl: I ê ki-su̍t si̍t-tsāi tsin ko-bîng.

english: He is good at talking. ─ He is good at praising or criticizing others.
poj: I kóng-ōe ê ki-su̍t chin ko-bêng.
tl: I kóng-uē ê ki-su̍t tsin ko-bîng.

english: He predicted that it will rain, truly it has begun to rain.
hanzi: 他說會下雨，果然在下雨了。
poj: I kóng ē lo̍h-hō͘, kó-jiân teh lo̍h ā.
tl: I kóng ē lo̍h-hōo, kó-jiân teh lo̍h ā.

poj: He sī góa kò-jîn ê būn-tê.
tl: He sī guá kò-jîn ê būn-tê.

english: I am busy, don't annoy me.
hanzi: 我沒空，不要跟我糾纏不休。
poj: Góa bô-êng , m̄-thang kap góa kô-kô-tîⁿ.
tl: Guá bô-îng , m̄-thang kap guá kô-kô-tînn.

poj: Góa ū hūn saⁿ pah kó͘.
tl: Guá ū hūn sann pah kóo.

english: have shares in a joint venture
A man of seventy years has rarely been seen since ancient times
I did it of necessity, not of choice.
hanzi: 我不想這樣，是不得已做的
poj: Góa m̄-sī ài án-ni, sī ko͘-put-chiong chò ê.
tl: Guá m̄-sī ài án-ni, sī koo-put-tsiong tsò ê.

english: He is very unfriendly, he is never willing to lend anything to others
hanzi: 他很孤吝，東西都不借人。
poj: I chin ko͘-sng (ko͘-ta̍k), mi̍h-kiāⁿ lóng bô boeh chioh lâng.
tl: I tsin koo-sng (koo-ta̍k), mi̍h-kiānn lóng bô bueh tsioh lâng.

english: take off a loose lid or cover (of a cooking pan)
The sweat stood in beads on his face.
poj: I ê bīn lâu kah tōa-lia̍p kōaⁿ sè-lia̍p kōaⁿ.
tl: I ê bīn lâu kah tuā-lia̍p kuānn sè-lia̍p kuānn.

english: His official reputation is not good so he worked a lifetime but didn't get an advancement.
hanzi: 他的官運不好，當了一輩子都沒升官。
poj: I ê koaⁿ-ūn bô hó, chò kui-sì-lâng lóng bô seng-koaⁿ.
tl: I ê kuann-ūn bô hó, tsò kui-sì-lâng lóng bô sing-kuann.

english: be wounded by a fragment from a bottle
when he earns money, he spends it on liquor.
poj: I chîⁿ thàn kòe-chhiú chiū lim tiāu.
tl: I tsînn thàn kuè-tshiú tsiū lim tiāu.

english: unable to do some one the injury we wish
He came from foreign country., He has been abroad.
hanzi: 他是過鹹水的，他是渡過洋的

english: It has rained so long already, do you think it will stop raining today?
hanzi: 雨下那麼久了，今天看會不會停。
poj: Hō͘ lo̍h hiah kú a, kin-á-ji̍t khòaⁿ ē kòe-hō͘ bē?
tl: Hōo lo̍h hiah kú a, kin-á-ji̍t khuànn ē kuè-hōo bē?

english: The frequency of my crossing a bridge is more than your walking. ─ I have much more experience than you.
hanzi: 我過的橋比你走的路還多。
poj: Góa kòe-kiô khah chē lí kiâⁿ-lō͘.
tl: Guá kuè-kiô khah tsē lí kiânn-lōo.

english: When I see a child doing a grown man's work I cannot feel at ease.
hanzi: 小孩做大人工作，我看得真過意不去。
poj: Gín-á chò tōa-lâng khang-khòe, góa khòaⁿ-tio̍h chin bē kòe-sim.
tl: Gín-á tsò tuā-lâng khang-khuè, guá khuànn-tio̍h tsin bē kuè-sim.

english: My armpit has a boil so I can't raise my arm up.
hanzi: 我的腋下長一個瘤，手舉不起來。
poj: Góa ê koeh-lâng-kha seⁿ chi̍t lia̍p lia̍p-á, chhiú giâ lóng bē khit-lâi.
tl: Guá ê kueh-lâng-kha senn tsi̍t lia̍p lia̍p-á, tshiú giâ lóng bē khit-lâi.

english: I am thinking of going there once more.
aureole round the head of a saint, halo
acting violently, boisterously, imperiously urgently or hurriedly
strong transverse bar for a door
I feel honored to attend this meeting.
hanzi: 我能來參加這個會，很光榮。
poj: Góa ē-tàng lâi chham-ka chit ê hōe, chin kong-êng.
tl: Guá ē-tàng lâi tsham-ka tsit ê huē, tsin kong-îng.

english: An inch of time is worth an inch of gold.
poj: It chhùn kong-im it chhùn kim.
tl: It tshùn kong-im it tshùn kim.

english: He and I are joint owners of that house.
hanzi: 那幢房子是他和我共有的
poj: Hit keng chhù sī i kap góa kong-ke ê.
tl: Hit king tshù sī i kap guá kong-ke ê.

english: I am waiting patiently to see if anyone will mention anything about it.
hanzi: 那件事情，我一直在等看看有沒有人要提起？
poj: Hit hāng tāi-chì góa it-ti̍t teh tán khòaⁿ ū lâng boeh kóng-khí bô͘?
tl: Hit hāng tāi-tsì guá it-ti̍t teh tán khuànn ū lâng bueh kóng-khí bôo?

english: He was beat up by a big bunch of people.
hanzi: 被一大群人攻打得很利害。
poj: Hō͘ chi̍t tōa-tīn lâng kong-táⁿ kah chin lī-hāi.
tl: Hōo tsi̍t tuā-tīn lâng kong-tánn kah tsin lī-hāi.

english: Many people live in that apartment house.
poj: Hit keng kong-ú ū tòa chin chē lâng.
tl: Hit king kong-ú ū tuà tsin tsē lâng.

english: That kind of phone is old fashioned, you have to crank it.
hanzi: 那種電話機是舊型的，要用搖的。
poj: Hit khoán tiān-ōe-ki sī kū-hêng-ê, ài iōng ká ê.
tl: Hit khuán tiān-uē-ki sī kū-hîng-ê, ài iōng ká ê.

english: He is one of my old friends.
That car is very old but yet he wants that much money for it.
hanzi: 那部車很舊了，又要賣那麼多錢。
poj: Hit tâi chhia kū-lok-sok a, koh boeh bē hiah-chē chîⁿ.
tl: Hit tâi tshia kū-lok-sok a, koh bueh bē hiah-tsē tsînn.

english: That man is very evasive, he never keeps his promises.
hanzi: 那個人很不乾脆，常常不守信用。
poj: Hit ê lâng chin ku-sui, tiāⁿ-tiāⁿ bô siú iok-sok.
tl: Hit ê lâng tsin ku-sui, tiānn-tiānn bô siú iok-sok.

english: The sentences in his letter are put together very well.
poj: I ê phe, kù-tāu siá liáu chiok hó ê.
tl: I ê phe, kù-tāu siá liáu tsiok hó ê.

english: He originally was a rich man.
I have only a little money.
bawling and making a great noise
guessing the total number of fingers which both sides hold up
An outsider cannot understand inside affairs.
He is a lazybones, wants to eat but does not work.
poj: I chin lán-si, boeh chia̍h m̄ chò.
tl: I tsin lán-si, bueh tsia̍h m̄ tsò.

english: He is so sluggish because of his weak condition.
hanzi: 他會那麼懶洋洋的，是因身體弱所致。
poj: I ē hiah-ni̍h lán-si, lóng-sī sin-thé lám só͘ tì ê.
tl: I ē hiah-ni̍h lán-si, lóng-sī sin-thé lám sóo tì ê.

english: He was unwilling to tell me, but I wheedled it out of him.
hanzi: 他不肯講，我把他套出來。
poj: I m̄ khéng kóng, góa kā i láu chhut-lâi.
tl: I m̄ khíng kóng, guá kā i láu tshut-lâi.

english: China root, a fungus growing on the roots of fir trees
I would rather die than suffer disgrace
poj: Góa lêng-goān sí, bô ài siū bú-jio̍k.
tl: Guá lîng-guān sí, bô ài siū bú-jio̍k.

english: neither a donkey nor a horse ─ nondescript
lose five games straight, lose five consecutive games
What I dread most is thunder.
He does not know what fear is.
obituary gift, an offering at the time of someone's funeral
cut in two with a single stroke of the sword (said of deciding a matter long unsettled) sever relations by one stroke
pension the aged, care for old persons
type of gourd, much larger at one end than the other, gourd shaped vessel for holding drugs
small portable fire pot for cooking
May you enjoy peace all the way! Bon voyage!
get in a temper, be angry
A forest fire brings trouble upon monkeys.
I don't know him. I am not acquainted with him.
I see it, but cannot tell what it is.
I wonder if he is at home?
poj: I m̄-chai ū tī chhù-ni̍h bô?
tl: I m̄-tsai ū tī tshù-ni̍h bô?

english: I don't know whether he is at home or not.
hanzi: 我不知道他在家沒有，他在不在家，我不知道。
poj: I ū tī lē á bô, góa m̄-chai.
tl: I ū tī lē á bô, guá m̄-tsai.

english: I don't know whether he is going or not.
poj: I boeh khì á m̄ góa m̄-chai.
tl: I bueh khì á m̄ guá m̄-tsai.

english: Why would I be so shameless as to go ask him first?
hanzi: 我怎麼不知恥會先去問他？
poj: Góa ká m̄-chai soe, góa ē seng khì mn̄g i?
tl: Guá ká m̄-tsai sue, guá ē sing khì mn̄g i?

english: If I could go to the States, wouldn't that be wonderful!
hanzi: 我要是能去美國該多好。
poj: Góa nā ē-tàng khì Bí-kok m̄ chin hó.
tl: Guá nā ē-tàng khì Bí-kok m̄ tsin hó.

english: I will not allow you to go.
I am very sad for the death of the child.
hanzi: 那個孩子死了，我很痛惜。
poj: Hit ê gín-ná sí khì, góa chin m̄-kam.
tl: Hit ê gín-ná sí khì, guá tsin m̄-kam.

english: One of my books disappeared. (is missing)
Does it cost as much as ten dollars ? Still more.
poj: He ài cha̍p kho͘ bô?     M̄-nā.
tl: He ài tsa̍p khoo bô?     M̄-nā.

english: He is not only lazy, but also is a dumbbell.
poj: I m̄-nā pīn-tōaⁿ, iū-koh chin gōng.
tl: I m̄-nā pīn-tuānn, iū-koh tsin gōng.

english: If he will not return it to me, I won't let him go.
hanzi: 他若不還我，我就不放過他。
poj: I nā m̄ hêng góa, góa chiū m̄ pàng i soah.
tl: I nā m̄ hîng guá, guá tsiū m̄ pàng i suah.

english: Precautions should be taken against him. He is a dangerous man. He is a powerful rival.
He is inhuman. He is very brutal.
If you don't give that kind things, he will cry
hanzi: 那個孩子東西不給他就哇哇叫。
poj: Hit ê gín-ná mi̍h-kiāⁿ m̄ hō͘ i, i tō mà-mà-kiò.
tl: Hit ê gín-ná mi̍h-kiānn m̄ hōo i, i tō mà-mà-kiò.

english: I'll give you a hard blow.
poj: Góa boeh kā lí mau lo̍h-khì.
tl: Guá bueh kā lí mau lo̍h-khì.

english: Men cannot be judged by their looks.
Children like to ask all sorts of questions all day long.
hanzi: 孩子整天都在問東問西。

english: too stingy to pull out a hair
peritoneum, the membrane lining the abdominal cavity and investing its viscera
She looks pinched and weak after her illness.
poj: I phòa-pēⁿ liáu-āu lóng mo͘h lo̍h-khì.
tl: I phuà-pēnn liáu-āu lóng mooh lo̍h-khì.

english: rice and sweet potatoes boiled to congee

poj: Góa ná tio̍h kā lí kóng?
tl: Guá ná tio̍h kā lí kóng?

english: If (when) he comes, tell him to wait for me.
poj: I nā lâi, kiò i tán góa.
tl: I nā lâi, kiò i tán guá.

english: It looks like he is going crazy.
If I could go to the States, wouldn't that be wonderful!
hanzi: 我如果能去美國那該多好。
poj: Góa nā ē-tàng khì Bí-kok m̄-chin-hó.
tl: Guá nā ē-tàng khì Bí-kok m̄-tsin-hó.

english: be burned slightly by the flame
Whenever he has some money, he goes to drink.
poj: I nā ū chîⁿ, chiū khì lim.
tl: I nā ū tsînn, tsiū khì lim.

english: I heard him murmuring (grumbling) about it.
poj: Góa ū thiaⁿ-kìⁿ i teh nauh.
tl: Guá ū thiann-kìnn i teh nauh.

english: eyes dim (so as to see quite indistinctly)
It doesn't matter if he doesn't want to go, let's twist his arm into going.
hanzi: 他如果不去沒關係，我們把他硬捉去。
poj: I nā m̄ khì bô iàu-kín, lán kā i ngē lia̍h khì.
tl: I nā m̄ khì bô iàu-kín, lán kā i ngē lia̍h khì.

english: put a pencil behind the ear
still able to move (as an animal not quite dead)
I happened to be there at that time.
poj: Hit ê sî góa gió-jiân tī hia.
tl: Hit ê sî guá gió-jiân tī hia.

english: There are so many people. We must have a leader.
hanzi: 那麼多人，沒有一個領隊不行。
poj: Hiah chē lâng bô chi̍t ê niá-tūi bē-ēng-tit.
tl: Hiah tsē lâng bô tsi̍t ê niá-tuī bē-īng-tit.

english: thin layer of fat between the skin and the flesh (especially of the pig but also in fruit like the coconut or durian)

hanzi: 他是我的結拜兄弟（他跟我換帖子）。
poj: I sī góa ê ōaⁿ-thiap ê (I kap góa ōaⁿ-thiap).
tl: I sī guá ê uānn-thiap ê (I kap guá uānn-thiap).

poj: Iâ-so͘ kàng-seng sī chi̍t ê ò-chek.
tl: Iâ-soo kàng-sing sī tsi̍t ê ò-tsik.

english: hate or dislike with much disgust
I am an ordinary man, and he is a VIP.
hanzi: 我是無名小卒，他是大人物。
poj: Góa sī o͘-chut-á, i sī tōa-jîn-bu̍t.
tl: Guá sī oo-tsut-á, i sī tuā-jîn-bu̍t.

english: The way he said it wasn't close to the real meaning.
hanzi: 他說的那件事意思差很多。
poj: I kóng hit ê tāi-chì kóng liáu lóng bô óa-ì.
tl: I kóng hit ê tāi-tsì kóng liáu lóng bô uá-ì.

english: His whole family depends on him for its livelihood.
hanzi: 他們一家人都依靠他一人生活。
poj: In chi̍t ke lâng lóng óa-khò i chi̍t ê teh seng-oa̍h.
tl: In tsi̍t ke lâng lóng uá-khò i tsi̍t ê teh sing-ua̍h.

english: person filling two offices, doing two things at the same time, a love triangle - one woman having an affair with two men (Lit. horse with two saddles)
hanzi: 一馬配兩鞍，一女配二男

english: use a steel box trap to catch a mouse
noise of chair or table creaking
In Rome do as the Romans do. (Lit. When entering a village follow the customs there, when entering a harbor follow the channel.)
poj: Ji̍p hiong sûi sio̍k, ji̍p káng sûi oan.
tl: Ji̍p hiong suî sio̍k, ji̍p káng suî uan.

english: Among those old bicycles there isn't one that is complete.
hanzi: 那些舊自行車沒有一輛是完整的。
poj: Hiah ê kū thih-bé bô chi̍t tâi sī oân-chéng ê.
tl: Hiah ê kū thih-bé bô tsi̍t tâi sī uân-tsíng ê.

english: The rich in the mountains has relatives from afar, while the poor in a bustling street has no one to take notice of him.
hanzi: 富在深山有遠親，貧在鬧市無人問。
poj: Hù chāi chhim-san iú oán-chhin, pîn chāi nāu-chhī bû jîn būn.
tl: Hù tsāi tshim-san iú uán-tshin, pîn tsāi nāu-tshī bû jîn būn.

english: I am going to find another road to return, I don't dare go back the same way I came.
hanzi: 我繞道回去，不敢從原路回去。
poj: Góa oan-lō͘ tńg-khì, m̄-káⁿ tùi goân-lō͘ tńg-khì.
tl: Guá uan-lōo tńg-khì, m̄-kánn tuì guân-lōo tńg-khì.

english: I gave him $100, but still he was not content.
hanzi: 我給他一百塊，他還是不滿足。
poj: Góa hō͘ i chi̍t pah kho͘, i oan-ná bē boán-chiok.
tl: Guá hōo i tsi̍t pah khoo, i uan-ná bē buán-tsiok.

english: He caught this disease at school.
poj: I khì ha̍k-hāu òe-tio̍h chit khoán pēⁿ.
tl: I khì ha̍k-hāu uè-tio̍h tsit khuán pēnn.

english: Waste paper is scattered all about.
His many private matters that he can explain in excessive detail all afternoon.
hanzi: 他話很多，一點點事情講了半天。
poj: I ê ōe-sái chin chē, chi̍t-sut-á tāi-chì kóng kui pòaⁿ-po͘.
tl: I ê uē-sái tsin tsē, tsi̍t-sut-á tāi-tsì kóng kui puànn-poo.

english: Say the important things, no need to go into excessive detail.
hanzi: 要緊的說就好，不用那麼多話。
poj: Iàu-kín ê kóng tō hó, m̄-bián hiah kāu ōe-sái.
tl: Iàu-kín ê kóng tō hó, m̄-bián hiah kāu uē-sái.

english: That accident was like a nightmare.
hanzi: 那次的車禍，好像是做一場惡夢。
poj: Hit pái ê chhia-hō, ná chò chi̍t tiûⁿ ê ok-bāng lè.
tl: Hit pái ê tshia-hō, ná tsò tsi̍t tiûnn ê ok-bāng lè.

english: There was no malice in what he said.
poj: I só͘ kóng ê, bô ok-ì.
tl: I sóo kóng ê, bô ok-ì.

english: People say that his sickness is caused by the influence of an evil spirit.
hanzi: 他的病是給惡煞煞到的。
poj: I ê pēⁿ kóng sī khì hō͘ ok-soah soah-tio̍h ê.
tl: I ê pēnn kóng sī khì hōo ok-suah suah-tio̍h ê.

english: The doctor is out visiting patients, he is not home.
poj: I-seng khì óng-chín, bô tī chhù-ni̍h.
tl: I-sing khì óng-tsín, bô tī tshù-ni̍h.

english: wanting to stop but unable to do so
good at ingratiating oneself with a powerful man by flattery, sycophancy
He has dropsy because his urine function is not good.
hanzi: 他會水腫是排尿功能不好的關係。
poj: I ē kōaⁿ-chúi sī pâi-jiō kong-lêng m̄-hó ê koan-hē.
tl: I ē kuānn-tsuí sī pâi-jiō kong-lîng m̄-hó ê kuan-hē.

english: His heart is very good, he is always helping people.
hanzi: 他的度量很好，常常幫助別人。
poj: I ê pak-tn̂g chin hó, tiāⁿ-tiāⁿ teh pang-chō͘ lâng.
tl: I ê pak-tn̂g tsin hó, tiānn-tiānn teh pang-tsōo lâng.

english: be on night duty, night shift
With that kind of appearance is it possible for him to be an assemblyman?
hanzi: 他那個樣子有辦法當議員嗎？
poj: I hit pān kám ū hoat-tō͘ thang chò gī-oân?
tl: I hit pān kám ū huat-tōo thang tsò gī-uân?

english: Because he treated me that way so I certainly will have it out with him.
hanzi: 他對我這樣，我絕不放他干休。
poj: I tùi góa án-ne, góa choa̍t-tùi m̄ pàng i kan-hiu.
tl: I tuì guá án-ne, guá tsua̍t-tuì m̄ pàng i kan-hiu.

english: I won't let you go. I will have it out with you.
They have over ten brothers so they are considered a large family clan.
hanzi: 他們有十多個兄弟，所以算是大家族。
poj: In ū cha̍p-gōa hiaⁿ-tī, só͘-í sǹg-sī tōa pâng-thâu.
tl: In ū tsa̍p-guā hiann-tī, sóo-í sǹg-sī tuā pâng-thâu.

english: For the things that I don't know how to do please be patient with me.
hanzi: 我不會的地方請多包容。
poj: Góa bē-hiáu ê só͘-chāi chhiáⁿ lí to-to pau-iông.
tl: Guá bē-hiáu ê sóo-tsāi tshiánn lí to-to pau-iông.

poj: I chheⁿ-mê sī pē-bó seⁿ-chiâ ê.
tl: I tshenn-mê sī pē-bó senn-tsiâ ê.

english: I'm very dumb, even this kind of question I don't know how to answer.
hanzi: 我很笨，連這種問題也不會。
poj: Góa chin pēⁿ, liân chit khoán ê būn-tê mā bē-hiáu.
tl: Guá tsin pēnn, liân tsit khuán ê būn-tê mā bē-hiáu.

english: That kind of cloth is too coarse so it unravels very easily.
hanzi: 那種布很稀鬆，所以很容易走紗。
poj: Hit khoán ê pò͘ siuⁿ lang, só͘-í chin iông-ī peh-se.
tl: Hit khuán ê pòo siunn lang, sóo-í tsin iông-ī peh-se.

english: tiger once out of his natural environment may be bullied even by a dog. ─ A hero or brave man is bullied by a bunch of weaklings when he is down on his luck
poj: Hó͘ lo̍h pêng-iûⁿ pī khián khi.
tl: Hóo lo̍h pîng-iûnn pī khián khi.

english: His sickness is sometimes better and sometimes worst, don't know if he will regain his health or not?
hanzi: 他的病時好時壞，不知會好否？
poj: I ê pēⁿ péng-khí-péng-tó, m̄-chai ē hó á bē?
tl: I ê pēnn píng-khí-píng-tó, m̄-tsai ē hó á bē?

english: He works six hours a day on the average.
hanzi: 他平均一天工作六小時。
poj: I chi̍t ji̍t pêng-kin chò la̍k tiám-cheng.
tl: I tsi̍t ji̍t pîng-kin tsò la̍k tiám-tsing.

english: When I smell that kind of odor it turns my stomach.
hanzi: 那種味兒我聞到快要嘔吐。
poj: Hit khoán bī góa phīⁿ-tio̍h giōng boeh péng-pak.
tl: Hit khuán bī guá phīnn-tio̍h giōng bueh píng-pak.

english: If a fish tank gets dirty all the fish die.
hanzi: 魚池的水一髒，魚都翻肚了。
poj: Hî-tî chi̍t-ē lah-sap, hî-á lóng péng-pe̍h.
tl: Hî-tî tsi̍t-ē lah-sap, hî-á lóng píng-pe̍h.

english: Men fear old age, debtors fear the demand for payment

poj: I kin-ná-ji̍t chhēng kah chin phāⁿ.
tl: I kin-ná-ji̍t tshīng kah tsin phānn.

english: Formerly they were like brothers but now they have turned hostile.
hanzi: 他們本來是像兄弟似的，不過現在已經翻臉了。
poj: In pún-lâi sī ná hiaⁿ-tī le, m̄-kú chím-á í-keng phah-put-bo̍k a.
tl: In pún-lâi sī ná hiann-tī le, m̄-kú tsím-á í-king phah-put-bo̍k a.

english: I am thinking of going to Taipei.
poj: Góa phah-sǹg boeh lâi khì Tâi-pak.
tl: Guá phah-sǹg bueh lâi khì Tâi-pak.

english: He has bad manner when he eats.
He has no son or grandson. (slang)
eruption of small boils on the head in hot weather
be somewhat overreached or beaten by him
allow someone to get more than his due from us, let him have the upper-hand (in a quarrel)
like to talk in a jesting way of another's looks
allow someone to get more than his due, let him have the upper-hand in a quarrel
That kid is very naught, it is not that easy to get him to leave.
hanzi: 那個孩子很皮，沒那麼容易叫得走。
poj: Hit ê gín-á chin phiâⁿ, bô hiah khoài kiò ē cháu.
tl: Hit ê gín-á tsin phiânn, bô hiah khuài kiò ē tsáu.

english: Her real name is "A-hui" but her nickname is "Big Head"
hanzi: 他的正名是阿飛，偏名是大頭。
poj: I ê chiàⁿ-miâ sī A-hui, phian-miâ sī Tōa-thâu.
tl: I ê tsiànn-miâ sī A-hui, phian-miâ sī Tuā-thâu.

english: Although I told him not to do it, he purposely did it anyway.
hanzi: 我叫他不要做，他偏偏要做。
poj: Góa kiò i mài chò, i phian-phian boeh chò.
tl: Guá kiò i mài tsò, i phian-phian bueh tsò.

english: championship (in a tournament), trophy (for a sports champion)
scoop up duck weed with a strainer
having a good constitution (so that a wound or sore heals quickly)
body in good condition (so that a wound heals easily)
residue from a mass of rendered fat
I'll fight with him at the risk of my life.
That thief's specialty is scooping out a hole in the wall.
hanzi: 那個小偷專門在挖牆洞的。
poj: Hit ê chha̍t-á lóng choan-bûn teh ó͘ piah-khang ê.
tl: Hit ê tsha̍t-á lóng tsuan-bûn teh óo piah-khang ê.

english: He had become another person. (used in bad sense)
I brought a lunch box so I don't need to go home to eat.
hanzi: 我有帶便當，所以不用回去吃。
poj: Góa ū tòa piān-tong, só͘-í m̄-bián tńg-khì chia̍h.
tl: Guá ū tuà piān-tong, sóo-í m̄-bián tńg-khì tsia̍h.

english: There is no proof for what he says, not one word is true.
hanzi: 他的話都是憑空捏造的，沒有半句是真的。
poj: I ê ōe lóng sī pîn-khong liap-chō ê, bô pòaⁿ kù sī chin ê.
tl: I ê uē lóng sī pîn-khong liap-tsō ê, bô puànn kù sī tsin ê.

english: the air bladder or scrotum of a fish
announce, publish the results of a competitive examination
publish the results of a competitive examination
A fox makes use of a tiger's majesty. (influence) "An ass in a lion's skin"
birds disgorge food to feed their young
The car hit that dog and knocked it half dead.
hanzi: 那隻狗被車撞到，差不多半死。
poj: Hit chiah káu-á hō͘ chhia pōng chi̍t-ē, chha-put-to pòaⁿ-sió-sí.
tl: Hit tsiah káu-á hōo tshia pōng tsi̍t-ē, tsha-put-to puànn-sió-sí.

english: He put aside his business and came to see me.
stumble so as almost to fall
publish the result of a competitive examination
false or grossly exaggerated reports spread abroad injuriously
I didn't graduate this time, I graduated last time.
hanzi: 我不是本屆畢業的，是上屆。
poj: Góa m̄-sī pún-kài pit-gia̍p ê, sī téng-kài.
tl: Guá m̄-sī pún-kài pit-gia̍p ê, sī tíng-kài.

english: be on your guard against unforeseen emergencies
There is no standing still. (in life) One either advances or retreats.
hanzi: 學如逆水行舟，不進則退。
poj: Ha̍k jû ge̍k-súi hêng-chiu, put-chìn chek thè.
tl: Ha̍k jû gi̍k-suí hîng-tsiu, put-tsìn tsik thè.

english: I am inferior to him. I am never his equal.
I am no more than an ordinary man.
poj: Góa put-kò sī chi̍t ê phó͘-thong-lâng.
tl: Guá put-kò sī tsi̍t ê phóo-thong-lâng.

english: My home lies to the west of the school.
poj: Goán tau tī ha̍k-hāu ê sai-pêng.
tl: Guán tau tī ha̍k-hāu ê sai-pîng.

english: use the influence or power of another
all going on well (e.g., when bringing up children)
He always has a cigarette in his mouth.
poj: I sî-kiâⁿ ài kā chi̍t ki hun.
tl: I sî-kiânn ài kā tsi̍t ki hun.

english: I sold him a bottle of wine on credit.
poj: Góa sia i chi̍t koàn chiú.
tl: Guá sia i tsi̍t kuàn tsiú.

english: The deity is miraculously responsive to prayers.
I am not interested in what you have. (said by children to one another)
the Lantern Festival (on the 15th day of the first moon on the Chinese lunar calendar, marking the end of New Year's festivities)
That clock is unpredictable. (sometimes fast sometimes slow)
unselfishly trouble oneself, put oneself out
His letter and mine have crossed in the mail.
hanzi: 他的信跟我的相錯過了。
poj: I ê phoe kap góa ê sio-chhut-lō͘.
tl: I ê phue kap guá ê sio-tshut-lōo.

english: heat hot water, e.g., for a bath
They live within a short distance of one another.
If he meets you, he doesn't greet you.
hanzi: 跟他相遇時，他都沒打招呼。
poj: I sio-tú-thâu ê sî, lóng bô sio-chioh-mn̄g.
tl: I sio-tú-thâu ê sî, lóng bô sio-tsioh-mn̄g.

english: I am on good terms with him.
I won't be friends with you.
poj: Góa bô ài kap lí siong-hó.
tl: Guá bô ài kap lí siong-hó.

english: night raid, make a night attack on
A single fault brings about endless remorse.
enjoy, indulge oneself in (some pleasant pursuit)
I will repair it for you. I will fix you, spank you.
I was born in the year of the pig.
I'll settle the account with him. I'll get even with him.
rambling about for amusement (often for evil pleasure)
He has the qualities of a musician.
That person is making a pest of himself over picayune inconsequential matters.
poj: Hit ê lâng chin soa-soa sap-sap.
tl: Hit ê lâng tsin sua-sua sap-sap.

english: give a farewell party to (a person)
gift of grace from the emperor or God, gracious gift
That person is very magnanimous. He is open and generous. He is generous and his friends are many.
spilt water cannot be gathered up
good at polite phrases and flattering talk
landscape geomancy, grave, especially as regards good luck
The husband sings, the wife follows. ─ domestic harmony
in a channel follow the windings, in a new place follow the customs
Though I did not see it with my own eyes.
In a strange land, do as the natives do. When in Rome do as the Romans do
to dry things over the fire
The pond is all dried up.
He lost at gambling and became penniless.
all of us (excludes the person spoken to)

poj: I pí góa khah tāi-seng lâi.
tl: I pí guá khah tāi-sing lâi.

english: lie on faggots and taste gall ─ nurse vengeance
What one commands is usually obeyed
the child is very troublesome, sickly
If he hits you, don't fight with him, go tell his parents.
hanzi: 要是他打你，不要和他打架，去告訴他父母。
poj: I nā phah lí, lí m̄-thang kap i phah, khì tâu in sī-tōa-lâng (pē-bó)
tl: I nā phah lí, lí m̄-thang kap i phah, khì tâu in sī-tuā-lâng (pē-bó)

english: to cash a check for money, money exchange, drafts
He doesn't want to do it, forget it ─ Don't talk about it again
to displease the guardian spirit of an unborn child by violating some taboo
How in the world would I have that much money?
poj: Góa thái-thó ū hiah chē chîⁿ?
tl: Guá thái-thó ū hiah tsē tsînn?

english: to bare the right shoulder (in punishment)
be covered up so as to have no air
seek or be in the limelight
according to the laws of Heaven, right, proper
business is brisk, good harvest, year of abundance
I have never heard that story.
poj: Hit tiâu kò͘-sū góa m̄ bat thiaⁿ-kòe (thiaⁿ-tio̍h).
tl: Hit tiâu kòo-sū guá m̄ bat thiann-kuè (thiann-tio̍h).

english: adding to what is already very good
She didn't hurt him on purpose.
hanzi: 她不是故意要使他傷心的。
poj: I m̄-sī thiau-tî boeh hō͘ i siong-sim.
tl: I m̄-sī thiau-tî bueh hōo i siong-sim.

english: pleasant for amusement, pleasant to play at or to amuse one's self with
I'd like to buy that off you. (said to a friend or some one we meet who has something we wish to buy, but not in the way of regular business)
fond of procrastinating, always putting off
be annoyed by others, be implicated
to pray and vow to the spirits and Buddhist idols
I'll hit you. I'll paste you one.
have goods or money taken from us
His right arm is out of joint.
I owe my success to him.
poj: Góa ê sêng-kong sī i tì-ìm ê.
tl: Guá ê sîng-kong sī i tì-ìm ê.

english: He is staying at a friend's home.
poj: I tiàm tī pêng-iú ê chhù.
tl: I tiàm tī pîng-iú ê tshù.

english: I'll take my spite out on you someday.
poj: Góa boeh kā lí tiám-iû chò kì-hō.
tl: Guá bueh kā lí tiám-iû tsò kì-hō.

english: obituary gift, incense money, offering sent to mourners
have no special skill, without any excellence to recommend one
skilful at making rapid and large returns out of one's money
take or carry in the hand a sword or knife
much talk leads to error, much politeness hold imposture (falsehood)
poj: Giân to pit sit, lé to pit chà.
tl: Giân to pit sit, lé to pit tsà.

english: throw down in wrestling, to push over
lend money to a person who cannot pay it back, bad debt
laws and statutes, ways means, method
my elder brother, our leader, our chief
incense burns unceasingly (in much frequented temple)
sever relations by one stroke, cut off a bad course of life at once
if jade be not worked it does not become a useful article
I agree with you. I am of your mind.
I will allow you to deduct it from my wages (or from the cost).
He was caught in a shower on his way.
ears very large (sign of good luck in making money)
He is always coming into conflict with his father over the conduct of affairs.
hanzi: 他做事常常拂逆他父母。
poj: I chò tāi-chì tiāⁿ-tiāⁿ kap in lāu-pē tùi-ke̍h.
tl: I tsò tāi-tsì tiānn-tiānn kap in lāu-pē tuì-ke̍h.

english: period of chaos, ignorant and dumb
He has lots of money, you can hit him up for some.
hanzi: 那個人現在很有錢，敲他的油沒關係。
poj: Hit ê lâng chím-má ū-bah, kā i khà-iû bô iàu-kín.
tl: Hit ê lâng tsím-má ū-bah, kā i khà-iû bô iàu-kín.

english: I have holdings in that company.
poj: Hit keng kong-si góa ū hūn.
tl: Hit king kong-si guá ū hūn.

english: There is a hole in the shirt.
poj: Hit niá saⁿ ū chi̍t khang.
tl: Hit niá sann ū tsi̍t khang.

hanzi: 接二連三的雨（雨下不停）

english: agree to one's face but act the contrary
He causes trouble wherever he goes
good fortune, be in luck, lucky, fortunate
strange, uncomfortable (because one is unaccustomed to sthg)
a musician who performs on Confucius birthday (formerly also for Imperial audiences and Governors, etc, cf ek8-seng)
foolish, stupid (credulous, improvident, naïve, gullible, etc)
field of vision (lit or metaph), outlook
eye socket, orbital cavity (col bak8-chiu khut-a2)
any of several sweeper fish, genus Parapriacanthus or genus Pempheris
accentor, a bird of the genus Prunella (in Taiwan represented only by Himalayan accentor, Prunella collaris nipalensis) (syn soann-liu3)
be bewildered, be baffled, be nonplussed
gulp (fish taking water or air at the surface)
aphid, any member of the family Aphiddidae
a kind of silver-eel, cutlass-fish, or hair-fish, Trichiurus haumela
month (measure used in specifying a point of time) <sann geh8 : the third month, or March>, <kui2 geh8 : which month?> (cf geh8-jit8)
first ten days of the month, the beginning of the month
month (measure used in specifying a point of time) <sann geh8-jit8 : three months>, <kui2 geh8-jit8 : how many months?> (cf geh8)
The "Moon Guitar", a four-stringed guitar with a large circular body
within the month after bearing a child
moon-cake (prepared for the Mid-Autumn Festival, the 15th of the 8th lunar month)
the 15th day of the lunar month
a kind of tick-clover, Desmodium heterophyllum
a kind of alpinia, Alpinia speciosa
rebel against law (usually the moral law is involved)
to against universally accepted principle, violate human obligations
rolling-pin, pestle, roller (used for pulverizing components of Chinese medicine)
burdened in heart, sick at heart
rejecting the old in favor of the new
welcome the gods back (after the New Year festival)
psocids, book lice, bark lice, dust lice, insects of the order Corrodentia
false habu, false hundredpacer, false viper (non-poisonous), Macropisthodon rudis
kamala tree, monkey-face tree, Mallotus philippensis
a thief who steals from the rich to help the poor
shake with fear, tremble with fear (var of gih8-gih8-chun3 / chhoah)
shake with fear, tremble with fear (var of gih8-gih8-chun3 / chhoah)
a meritorious or philanthropic deed, a deed done in the public interest
carry (sthg bulky and heavy) with both hands
a plant of the lettuce family, Lactuca indica
centipede plant, ribbon bush, wire vine, Homalocladium platycladum
a variety of fern, Helminthoslachys zeylanica
lift (with the end of a long instrument-needle, pencil, stick), remove (sliver with a needle), remove (dead snake with a stick), etc
like, as if <I giam2-jian5 si7 chit8 e5 lau7-bu2 : she (an elder sister) acts like a mother, takes the responsibility of a mother>
strong enough to cope with any eventuality, resilient
rigid, strict, severe (personality of father, boss, God)
"a severe Mandarin makes robbers abound", a severe father may have bad children
Taoist Pluto, god of the underworld, judge of the dead (syn giam5-lo5-ong5)
Taoist Pluto, god of the underworld, judge of the dead (syn giam5-kun)
seminar, short series of meetings of scholars for intensive research
short series of study sessions, workshop
crave (alcohol, opium, tobacco, sexual intercourse, etc)
protrude, stick out (teeth, sharp rocks, nail, etc)
clip or pinch securely, press (leaves, etc, in a book), hold (sthg under the arm), catch (mice with a spring-trap), etc
(miserable life as) a recompense (for great wickedness in a former life)
bite or pinch (person cutting thread with his teeth, insect jaws, crab's pincers, etc), be bitten or pinched
a lizard of the gekko family, Hemidactylus frenatus (col sian7-lang5 / tang5-a2)
jibe, poke fun at, play practical jokes on
doubt (something said), be suspicious of (a person)
shake with fear, tremble with fear
shake with fear, tremble with fear
spring, spray, twig, tip of a branch, etc
that part of the floor-slab which projects beyond the outer wall of a house (it is several inches above the surrounding earth and serves to keep the house dry)
paved terrace in front of a house
paved terrace in front of a house
pet name (formed by affixing a2 to one syll of given name), nickname
a destructive night-flying moth, Phytometra ni
paper money (burned to provide the dead with money)
